escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 50A 4-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5x30.5 (F4 MCU)

escs.name: HGLRC 60A V1 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5x30.5
escs.description: The HGLRC 60A V1 ESC is a compact 4-in-1 speed controller built for reliable 2–6S performance.

escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A AM32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A AM32 is the first 4-in-1 ESC on the market to adapt the fast F4 MCU. Updated to run on open-source AM32 firmware, it offers enhanced control and quick response.

escs.name: FETtec SFOC 50A 2-8S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The FETtec SFOC 50A 4-in-1 ESC (Simplified Field Oriented Control) is an innovative approach to control brushless three-phase motors.

escs.name: Lumenier Mini Razor Pro 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Lumenier Mini Razor Pro AM32 ESC features a future-proof, powerful F3 processor.

escs.name: Orqa 3030 70A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
escs.description: Get ready to take your drone’s performance to new heights with the state-of-the-art Orqa 3030 70A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC.

escs.name: iFlight Borg 60RS 60A 4-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: Experience enhanced reliability and performance with the iFlight Borg 60RS 60A 4-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, tailored for the demands of competitive racing.

escs.name: Lumenier Siege 80A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
escs.description: The Lumenier Siege 80A ESC features some of the latest technology in power electronics, including best-in-class power transistors.

escs.name: HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
escs.description: The HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20 is designed for pilots who demand both power and reliability.

escs.name: Hobbywing XRotor G2 Micro 65A 6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
escs.description: The HOBBYWING XRotor FPV G2 65A 4-in-1 ESC is a high-performance power system for FPV racing drones, now upgraded with open-source AM32 firmware for faster updates, expanded features, and enhanced stability over BLHeli-32.

escs.name: XILO Stax V3 F4 50A AM32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The XILO Stax V3 4-in-1 50A 3-6S AM32 ESC is fully plug-and-play with the XILO Stax FC, ensuring seamless integration. Now featuring an upgraded F4 processor, AM32 firmware, and increased amperage for enhanced performance.

escs.name: TBS Lucid 90A 3-12S AM32 ESC - NDAA
escs.description: The NDAA Version of the TBS Lucid 12S ESC is built for high-voltage, high-power applications where reliability is non-negotiable.

escs.name: Darwinfpv Cement 100A 3 8S 32Bit Esc
escs.description: Introducing Darwin FPV's "Cement" ESC: the ultimate solution for professional pilots, addressing the reliability issues of FPV drones.

escs.name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 100A V2 6-12S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Lumenier ELITE PRO 100A V2 12S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC is a powerful and professional grade ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor, which is capable of driving large brushless drone motors for commercial applications.

escs.name: TBS Lucid 60A 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - Gorilla 39x16
escs.description: The TBS Lucid ESC is TBS's latest engineering feat, designed for racing and freestyle. It features an 8-layer high-current-density board with double the market average capacitance, ensuring durability in intense FPV flying.

escs.name: Aikon AK32Pro II 50A 2-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Aikon AK32Pro II 4-in-1 50A 6S continues Aikon’s pursuit of excellence! This new ESC combines the latest forward-looking capabilities with an L4-based processor and dual MOSFET packages.

escs.name: Zeez 45A 2020 V3 3S-6S BLHELI32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The ZEEZ 45A 4-in-1 ESC comes with the fastest MCU available which is fully supported by BLHELI32 and STM32G0.

escs.name: TBS Lucid 60A 3-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - NDAA
escs.description: Engineered for peak performance, the NDAA Version of the TBS Lucid 60A 4-in-1 ESC is designed to satisfy both seasoned pilots and ambitious newcomers.

escs.name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 60A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
escs.description: The Lumenier ELITE PRO 60A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC delivers maximum power and efficiency for Cinelifters, large drones, and high-speed racing builds, supporting up to 60A per channel on 2-6S LiPo batteries.

escs.name: Skystars KO25 25A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
escs.description: The Skystars Skystars KO25 25A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC comes with BLHeli_S firmware, supports DShot DShot300/600 and this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad!

escs.name: HAKRC AIO Board - Brushless F722 FC + 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC w/ External USB
escs.description: This HAKRC AIO Board features a brushless F722 flight controller and a 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC. This version carries an external USB. This is an ultra-light 7g brushless AIO flight controller!! This FC has a strong performance and can handle 40A continuous current and up to 6S.

escs.name: SkyStars KRAMAM 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

escs.name: HDZero Halo 70A 3-8S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20

escs.name: Skystars KM55 55A AM32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
escs.description: The Skystars KM55 55A AM_32 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 20x20mm mounting pattern. Supports Dshot 600/1200, telemetry functions (including voltage, RPMS & current ), and includes the latest AM_32 firmware.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F4 V1.2 3-6S BHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC - 45A

escs.description: The iFlight BLITZ E80 uses a MOSFET PSMN1R0-40YLD, which can withstand a continuous current of 80A at 25°C, with a maximum power dissipation of 198W.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F4 V1.2 3-8S BHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC - 60A
escs.description: The Foxeer Reaper F4 Mini V1.1 ESC is the next evolution of the Reaper ESC series. With its low heat generation and high-quality mosfets, this new version has a smoother flight, with fewer desyncs.

escs.name: RUSHFPV RUSH BLADE 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Extreme Edition 96K

escs.description: The ZEEZ 55A 4-in-1 ESC comes with the fastest MCU available, which is fully supported by BLHELI32 and STM32G0. It supports Bi-directional DSHOT, all digital protocols (DSHOT150, DSHOT300, DSHOT600) out of the box, and many other things!

escs.name: T-Motor VELOX Lite V45A 3-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The VELOX Lite V45A 3-6S BLHeliS 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is a lightweight and budget-friendly 4-in-1 ESC with great performance.

escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 BigFET 50A 4-in-1 ESC - Mini 20x20
escs.description: The Tekko32 F4 BigFET 50A ESC is made for those that use a 20x20 mount and also need the power of a big MOSFET.

escs.name: HGLRC Zeus 50A Pro 3-8S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC - Mini 20x20

escs.name: JHEMCU AIO Board - GSF405A F4 FC + 5A 1-2S ESC w/ Built-in ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
escs.description: The JHEMCU GS405A AIO features an F4 FC and a 5A ESC with built-in ELRS 2.4GHz receiver. This is an ultra-light 3.3g brushless AIO flight controller with 25.5x25.5mm mounting pattern!! This FC can handle 5A of continuous current and up to 2S.

escs.name: Skystars KRAMAM 50A Pro 3-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 50A Pro 3-6S AM_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern. Combined with AM_32  firmware to make a smooth ESC.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba Mini 128K 6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F40 40A
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba Mini F40 40A ESC brings BIG power all in a 20x20 mounting size! This ESC can push 40A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F65 65A
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F65 65A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 65A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F45 45A
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F45 45A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 45A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba 128K 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - F55 55A
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F55 55A ESC brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This ESC can push 55A all while bringing you the latest features! This is the 128K version.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba F55 55A 6S BLS 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F55_BLS 6S 4-in-1 is a 30x30 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. This 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high power builds up to 6S.

escs.name: T-Motor VELOX V50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Velox V50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is the ultimate ESC for your build. Adopting the QN3109 1.5 MOS, the V50A has been upgraded with an 18% performance increase to fly in confidence even during high-current spikes.

escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 F4 Metal 65A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The all-new Tekko32 Metal is the first 4-in1- ESC in the market to adapt to the fast F4 MCU. Powerful & reliable metal-cased MOSFET 4-in-1 ESC with smooth control and quick response.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A
escs.description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 96K 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A/60A
escs.description: The Foxeer Reaper Mini 96K BL32 4-in-1 ESC is designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight. Available in 45A or 60A.

escs.name: Lumenier ELITE PRO 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 60A
escs.description: The Lumenier Elite Pro 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC is a powerful ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor. The double heatsink design provides excellent cooling required for high power setups often required in Cinema and heavy-lift drones.

escs.name: iFlight Beast F7 V2 55A AIO 25.5x25.5mm Flight Controller
escs.description: The Beast F7 55A AIO V2 FC is iFlight's new innovation! The new Beast series of AIO FCs combines MCU speed with ESC for a bigger stack!

escs.name: Diatone Mamba F40 40A 6S BLS 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F40_BLS 6S 4-in-1 is a 30x30 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. This MINI 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high power builds up to 6S.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba MINI F40 40A BLS Dshot600 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Diatone Mamba F40_BLS MINI Dshot600 4-in-1 is a 20x20 ESC that provides a high-power BLS in a small, but easy-to-install package. Recommended for 3", 4" and 5" ultralight builds!

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper FPV 3-8S 65A BLHeli_32 30x30 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Foxeer Reaper FPV is a 65A BL32 4-in-1 ESC designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight.

escs.name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
escs.description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 45A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

escs.name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 25A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
escs.description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 25A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

escs.name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
escs.description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The Micro Combo features a 60A 4-in-1 ESC along with an updated F7 Flight Controller. This new FC is similar to other versions with its OSD, and voltage monitoring, but the F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system.

escs.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 FC + 50A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC
escs.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 Flight Controller + ESC is DJI HD system ready with an onboard 9v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug-and-play configuration.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A/60A
escs.description: The Foxeer Reaper Mini BL32 4-in-1 ESC is designed to plug n play with the Foxeer F722 Mini FC, giving you a super low-profile stack for your build that is also lightweight. Available in 45A or 60A.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A
escs.description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 60A

escs.name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_32 45A/60A
escs.description: The Skystars KO series BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESCs have a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. And with BLHeli_32 firmware, you won't be bottlenecked by your ESC.

escs.name: T-Motor P50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Limited Edition)
escs.description: The P50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is inspired by the PACER P2208 Motors!

escs.name: NewBeeDrone Infinity305 45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 30x30 ESC
escs.description: The NewBeeDrone Infinity305 ESC is a solid 30.5x30.5 ESC that is also plug-and-play with the DJI Digital FPV System!

escs.name: Spedix IS40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Spedix IS40 40A 4-in-1 20x20 ESC (3-6S) is one of the most reliable 20mm ESCs in the market and can support up to 6S racing drones!

escs.name: Flycolor X-Cross Mini 45A 3-6S BL_Heli32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC
escs.description: This FLYCOLOR X-Cross Mini is a 4-in-1 ESC was designed for high-stress racing drones. The reduced impedance and high-quality MOSFET allow for high-current to effortlessly flow through to your motors.

escs.name: Foxeer Reaper Mini F7 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A
escs.description: Foxeer Reaper Mini 3-6S BL32 4-in-1 20x20 ESC - 45A

escs.name: T-Motor Velox V2 V45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The V45A 4-in-1 ESC V2 by T-Motor is inspired by the VELOX V2207 and V2306 Motors! The V45A V2 MOS has been upgraded with a 15% performance increase to fly in confidence even during high-current spikes.

escs.name: SkyStars KRAMAM Turbo2020 KM45 45A BLHeli_32 3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KRAMAM Turbo2020 KM45 45A 4-in-1 ESC features BLHeli_32, Dshot 600/1200, 20x20 mounting holes, supports telemetry functions (including voltage, RPMS & current ), and other cool features!

escs.name: SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 + KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
escs.description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

escs.name: SkyStars Fly Tower Mini Stack - F7 HD FC+ KM40 40A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
escs.description: The SkyStars F7 HD 20X20 Fly Stack comes with the SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller and  KM40 40A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC, to give your multirotor full power!

escs.name: SkyStars KM35 35A BLHeli_S 3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KM35 35A  3-6S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC features BLHeli_S, Dshot 300/600, 20X20 mounting holes, excellent over-current capability, better control performance and supports 6S Lipo batteries!

escs.name: T-Motor Mini F45A 3-6S 32-Bit 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The T-Motor Mini F45A 6S is a 4-in-1 ESC that comes with a 20x20 mounting pattern and 32-BIT for high performance and fast response!

escs.name: JHEMCU GHF411 Pro 35A BLHELI_S 3-6S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
escs.description: The JHEMCU GH411 35A FC is a new ultra-light 7.3g brushless AIO flight controller!

escs.name: Zeez Design 2020 45A 3-6S BlHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Zeez Design 2020 45A 3-6S BlHeli32 4-in-1 ESC supports up to 6S input, and it features STM32L4 MCU, supports BlHeli32 firmware, Dshot150, Dhsot300, Dshot600, ProShot 1000 among many cool features!

escs.name: DYS 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S DShot 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The DYS 45A 4-in-1 ESC is an ideal choice for an ESC platform where build space is at a premium! This 45A ESC supports DShot 150,300 and 600, Oneshot125, Oneshot42, and Multishot protocols.

escs.name: V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller (F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box)
escs.description: The V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller comes F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box, and many other cool features all-in-1 board!

escs.name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE F722 FC & 50A 30x30 & RUSH Tank Ⅱ VTX & RUSH PFB Stack/Combo
escs.description: The RUSH BLADE F722 Stack for analog by RUSHFPV features the RUSH TANK II 5.8GHz VTX, RUSH BLADE F722 Flight Controller, RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Sports Edition), and the RUSH Power Filter Board (PFB), which can handle up to 6S input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

escs.name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - Sport Edition
escs.description: The RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC Sport's Edition by RUSHFPV features, front & back special process aluminum shell, F051 MCU 48MHZ with BLHeli_32 Firmware, 48K PWM FREQ. 3oz dual board and 40V rated MOSFET.

escs.name: Aikon AK32PIN 20x20 4-in-1 35A 6S BLHeli32 ESC - V2
escs.description: The Aikon AK32 V2 35A 4IN1 BLHeli32 comes with the STM32F051 microprocessor with the latest BLHeli_32 firmware. This is V2 with the aluminum heatsink.

escs.name: JHEMCU 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The JHEMCU BLheli 32 55A 4-in-1 ESC uses 32-bit ARM Cortex MCU STM32F051 48MHZ processor, 2048-level throttle resolution, unique algorithm control, and strong anti-interference ability.

escs.name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 25A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
escs.description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 25A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

escs.name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 45A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
escs.description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 45A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

escs.name: SkyStars KRAMAM 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KRAMAM 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

escs.name: SkyStars Turbo2020 KM55A Mini 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The SkyStars KRAMAM Mini 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC brings tons of great features all in a 20x20mm mounting pattern.

escs.name: Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Bundle (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC)
escs.description: The Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate + Razor LED 55A Stack (F7 FC, 55A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC) Combo. Save 5% when buying this as a bundle!

escs.name: T-Motor Mini F45A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The T-Motor Mini F45A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC is loaded with lots of power, all in a 20x20 ESC!

escs.name: T-Motor Cinematic F30A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The T-Motor Cinematic F30A 6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC is loaded with lots of power, all in a 20x20 ESC!

escs.name: T-Motor Mini F7  Stack + F45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: Get a better flying experience with the T-Motor Mini F45 + Mini F7 Stack! This stack brings lots of power all in a small package!

escs.name: HGLRC Forward 60A 3-6S BLHeil32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The HGLRC Forward 60A 3-6S F3 BLHeil32 4-in-1 ESC is a high-performance ESC that comes with a brand new CPU (STM32F051), supports DSHOT1200/600/300/150.ONESHOT125/42 and has a running frequency up to 48MHZ.

escs.name: FETtec 35A V1.1 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
escs.description: This FETtec 6S capable 4-in-1 ESC features KISS FC passthrough and fits on 20x20 mounting holes. Lots of capability in this tiny ESC!

escs.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Frsky
escs.description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features D8/D16 switchable, compatible with non-EU transmitter (both D8 and D16 mode) and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

escs.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Flysky
escs.description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features AFHDS and AFHDS-2A switchable, failsafe support, and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

escs.name: Lumenier Razor LED 55A 4-in-1 F3 BLHeli_32 2-6s ESC
escs.description: The Lumenier Razor LED 55A 4in1 F3 BLHeli_32 2-6s ESC. A robust ESC with onboard RBG LEDs and a pre-programmed LED controller with easy-press button, plus PDB to power and control 4x additional arm LEDs.

escs.name: Flywoo GOKU 406S 40A BLHeli_32 2-6S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Flywoo GOKU 406S 40A 4-in-1 ESC brings serious power in a 20x20 game! Stackable with other mini FC's like the GOKU F722 Mini F7 Flight Controller.

escs.name: T-Motor P50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The P50A 4-in-1 ESC by T-Motor is inspired by the PACER P2208 Motors!

escs.name: HAKRC 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The HAKRC 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC provides great power and value in a 20x20mm/30.5x30.5mm mounting pattern.

escs.name: FPVCrate Crater 46A 3-6S BLHeliSuite32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The FPVCrate Crater 46 ESC has a constant current rating of 46 amps. This means that this ESC can withstand and deliver 46 amps without overheating.

escs.name: Diatone Mamba F405 DJI Stack - F50PRO HV 50A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Mamba F405 DJI + F50PRO 50A Stack from Diatone brings BIG power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting size! This stack can push 50A all while bringing you the latest features!

escs.name: Lumenier Elite 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Lumenier Elite 60A 2-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC. A powerful ESC with the latest BLHeli_32 + telemetry and current sensor and capable of 60A current support on up to 6s!

escs.name: T-Motor F7 Stack - F7 FC + F55A PRO II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: T-Motor's powerful F7 Flight Controller combined with the F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance and seamless integration in your electronics stack.

escs.name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (45A 2-6S Pro ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
escs.description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

escs.name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (30A 2-6S ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
escs.description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

escs.name: BETAFPV Beta85X for GoPro - DSMX
escs.description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

escs.name: BETAFPV Beta85X for GoPro - Crossfire
escs.description: The new T-Motor's update of the F55A Pro II, the MCU F3 is a much faster ESC with high performance for demanding racing events.

escs.name: Spedix GS40F 40A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 Mini ESC
escs.description: Spedix GS40F Mini is an reliable 20x20mm 6S 4-In-1 ESC.

escs.name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F45A V2 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-In-1 ESC Combo
escs.description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controller combined with the F45A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance - using the included 10pin cable for solderless installation and ultra-low stack height.

escs.name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC Combo
escs.description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controler combined with the F55A PRO II 55A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you an experience!

escs.name: Spedix IS35 2-5S 35A 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The IS35 is a new 35A 4-in-1 ESC featuring BLHeli_S and current monitoring.

escs.name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro 60A 6S 4-in-1 BLHeli32 ESC
escs.description: Hobbywing's XRotor 60A 4-in-1 ESC raises the bar for ESCs. Hobbywing electronics are rock solid and the 60A ESC is no exception. Extra focus was put into this ESC to make it extremely reliable for any setup you are running.

escs.name: Spedix GS45 45A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The GS45 iterates on the previous GS40 ESC from Spedix. The GS45 adds a bit more headroom to the power output, improves the heatsink design, optimizes the layout, and even adds a 10V 2A BEC.

escs.name: XILO Stax Combo - F4 Flight Controller + 45A BLHeli_32 6s 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Stax Combo by XILO is a high performance F4 Flight Controller paired with a 45A 32bit 6s 4-in-1 ESC. The plug and play connection makes it easy to install and use on your favorite airframe

escs.name: iFlight SucceX Mini F4 V2 + 35A 2-6S BLHeli32 Fly Tower Stack
escs.description: This stack includes the advanced SucceX Mini F4 V2.1 Flight Controller along with the SucceX 35A V2 4-in-1 ESC, which can handle up to 6s input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

escs.name: Holybro Tekko32 F3 Metal 65A 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Holybro Tekko32 BLHeli32 Metal ESC with F3 MCU is a 4-in-1 ESC with metal cased MOSFETs. Using metal case MOSFETs result in better heat dissipation.

escs.name: T-Motor F55A Pro 55A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description:
New version available - https://www.getfpv.com/t-motor-f55a-pro-ii-55a-3-6s-blheli32-4-in-1-esc-w-bec.html

The T-Motor F55A 4-in-1 ESC is fully capable of pushing 6s with 75A burst and a sustained 55A current draw. Equipped with the latest in ESC technology such as 32-bit capability and BLHeli32 firmware.

escs.name: DALRC Rocket 45A 3-6s BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: DALRC is back with another great 4-in-1 ESC, the Rocket! This time, supporting up to 45A of power!

escs.name: Spedix GS40 40A 2-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

escs.name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro 45A 6S 4-in-1 ESC Dshot1200
escs.description: The Hobbywing Xrotor Micro 45A 6S 4 in 1 ESC Dshot1200

escs.name: Spedix GS25 25A 4-in-1 2-4s BLHeli_32 Dshot ESC
escs.description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

escs.name: Racerstar Special Anniversary Edition 35A BLheli_S 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: Racerstar has released this ESC for their 11th Anniversary. Equipped with BLheli_S, Dshot600, PWM/OneShot/MultiShot, and a current sensor, this 4-in-1 ESC is ready to power your drone on the cheap.

escs.name: FlightOne SKITZO Spark32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The FlightOne Spark32 4-in-1 electronic speed controller (ESC) provides the power of BlHeli_32 performance in a tiny package. This makes your electronic stack small, and generally eliminates the need for an additional PDB. The Spark32 4n1 ESC performs great, helps clean up any build, and is perfect for your 3″ or 5″+ build.

escs.name: FlightOne SKITZO Spark V2 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The FlightOne Spark 4-in-1 electronic speed controller (ESC) provides the power of BlHeli_S performance in a tiny package.

escs.name: Spedix GS35 35A 4-in-1 2-4s BLHeli_32 Dshot ESC
escs.description: Reliable and high-performance 32 bit 4-in-1 ESC from Spedix.

escs.name: DYS F30A 4-in-1 ESC BLHeli_S Dshot
escs.description: The DYS F30A 4-in-1 ESC BLHeli_S Dshot.

escs.name: Lumenier BLHeli_S 35A 4-in-1 12v / 5v BEC DSHOT ESC +Current Sensor
escs.description: A 4 in 1 version of Lumenier's 35A Blheli_S  ESC with 12v/5v BEC, Current and Voltage Sensor. Advanced ESC with BB2 chip, perfect for compact builds.

escs.name: V-Good RC ARM A32 ESC Program Card V4.0 w/ LED
escs.description: The V-Good RC ARM A32 ESC Program Card V4.0 helps you adjust various settings of your ESC. This V4.0 updated version features a new software structure that reduces burn rate along with energy saving, bideriection, and better motor compatibility.

escs.name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_S KO55II 55A
escs.description: The Skystars KO55II BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC has a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. With BLHeli_S firmware, this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad.

escs.name: KISS FC V2 - 32bit Flight Controller
escs.description: Get top performance in a simplified package with the Kiss 32bit Flight Controller V2 with onboard F7 chip.

escs.name: KISS 2-5S 25A (40A limit) 32bit 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The KISS ESC25A 4-in-1 powered by an M4 MCU is the latest member of the KISS family, designed for racing quads with demanding motors.

escs.name: FETtec 45A 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
escs.description: The FETtec 45A 3-6S ESC is a powerful 4-in-1 electronic speed controller that has a mounting pattern of 30.5x30.5 and supports Dshot 300-2400, OneShot 42/125, PWM, Crossfire, SBUS, and other features!

escs.name: HIFIONRC 60A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: HIFIONRC's 60A 4-in-1 ESC is capable of supporting high powered builds at up to 6S.

escs.name: Lumenier Mini Razor Pro 4in1 20x20 F3 BLHeli_32 45A 2-6s ESC
escs.description: The Mini Razor Pro 45A 4in1 ESC was designed for the drone pilot who loves the tiny 20x20 form factor but also wants to squeeze out every ounce of juice out of their equipment as possible.

escs.name: Heatsink for Typhoon32 V2
escs.description: Custom GetFPV heatsink for the Airbot Typhoon32 ESC.

escs.name: Flycolor X-Tower F4 FC + 40A BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
escs.description: The Flycolor F4 40A Stack gives you all the essentials you need to get in the air and fly with the best components.

escs.name: FlightOne AfterBurner 50A 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The AfterBurner ESC is the first ESC from FlightOne made to be used in either 30x30 or 20x20 quads, capable of 50A per channel or higher.

escs.name: HAKRC 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The HAKRC 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S 20x20 4-in-1 ESC provides great power and value in a 20x20mm mounting pattern.

escs.name: Skystars 4-in-1 3-6S 30x30 ESC - BLHeli_S KO45 45A
escs.description: The Skystars KO45 BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC has a 6-layer design and over-current capabilities. With BLHeli_S firmware, this ESC is a cost-effective solution for your quad.

escs.name: Flycolor X-Cross 60A 3-6S BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: The Flycolor X-Cross 60A 4-in-1 ESC was made to satisfy power-hungry quads. With 60A of continuous current support, you will have plenty of headroom to push your rig to the limit.

escs.name: ARK 4IN1 ESC CONS (Connectorized)
escs.description: Blue UAS Framework listed 4-in-1 ESC. 50A continuous / 75A burst per motor, 3-8S (up to 65V), STM32F0 MCU, AM32 firmware. DroneCAN + DShot 300/600, onboard 100V/A current sensor. MR30 connectors for mass manufacturing. Made in USA.

escs.name: Unusual Machines Brave 55A 4-in-1 ESC
escs.description: Blue UAS Framework listed 4-in-1 ESC. 55A continuous / 75A burst, AM32 firmware, 30.5x30.5mm mounting. Manufactured by Ewing Aerospace in Ohio, USA. NASDAQ: UMAC.

escs.name: Hargrave Technologies microDRIVE LP
escs.description: Defense-grade individual ESC. 60A continuous / 110A burst, 15-60V, IP67, DroneCAN, proprietary GateKEEPER firmware with FOCAL algorithm. 72-hour onboard data logging, 60+ configurable parameters. 94g. Australian Sovereign Capability Defence Grant recipient.

escs.name: Hargrave Technologies nanoDRIVE 4LPi
escs.description: Defense-grade 4-in-1 ESC. 20A per channel, 7-34V, DroneCAN + ARINC825, 30x30mm mounting. Dual-input priority power failover. Designed for tactical/FPV platforms.

escs.name: KDE Direct UAS75HVC ESC
escs.description: Heavy-lift individual ESC. 75A+ continuous (125A+ models available), 4-14S, IP66, DroneCAN/KDECAN protocol. Aluminum heat-sink enclosure. Made in USA for commercial and defense heavy-lift UAS.

escs.name: Vertiq 81-08 G2 Integrated Motor+ESC Module
escs.description: Blue UAS Framework listed integrated motor+ESC module. Up to 60A/14S. DroneCAN, ArduPilot/PX4 native support. Embedded position sensing for precision control. 81mm stator. Made in USA.

escs.name: Simplex Motion SM4010 FOC ESC
escs.description: European (Swedish) industrial FOC motor controller for UAS. Up to 4,000W. Field-Oriented Control for smooth, efficient operation. Only identified European ESC manufacturer for defense/commercial UAS.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC F405 V1 2-8S Flight Controller - 30.5x30.5
flight_controllers.description: This HGLRC F405 V1 flight controller features a high-precision ICM42688P gyroscope for smooth, stable handling, with optional support for the MPU6000.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C - Aluminum Case
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6C - Aluminum Case is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk® flight controllers, based on the Pixhawk® FMUv6C Open Standard and Connector Standard

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C - Plastic Case
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6C - Plastic Case is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk® flight controllers, based on the Pixhawk® FMUv6C Open Standard and Connector Standard.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ H743 Wing Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: Introducing iFlight Blitz H743 wing Flight Controller, designed specifically for fixed-wing UAV enthusiasts, is compatible with Betaflight, INAV, and Ardupilot.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot CubeLAN 8-Port Switch
flight_controllers.description: The CubePilot CubeLAN 8-Port Switch is a miniature Ethernet switch that can connect up to eight Ethernet devices.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot Cubenode ETH
flight_controllers.description: The CubePilot CubeNode ETH ethernet adapter allows STM32 H7 autopilots without built-in ethernet support to connect to ethernet peripherals.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot CubeNode V3
flight_controllers.description: The CubePilot CubeNode V3 provides a platform to develop, create, test, and refine components such as navigation systems, communication modules, sensors, payloads, and more.

flight_controllers.name: Orqa QuadCore H7 Flight Controller - ICM42688 - NDAA
flight_controllers.description: The Orqa QuadCore H7 is an innovative NDAA-compliant flight controller designed specifically for quadcopter drones.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX H743 Flight Controller - NDAA
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX H743 – NDAA Flight Controller features some of the latest sensors in drone technology, including the next-generation InvenSense ICM-45686 Gyro/Accelerometer, Infineon DPS368 barometer, and STMicroelectronics LIS2MDL magnetometer.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazybee V1.0 5-in-1 AIO - G473 FC + 5A 1S Bluejay ESC + ELRS RX
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel Crazybee V1.0 5-in-1 AIO is the first 5-in-1 board based on the G473 MCU platform from Happymodel.

flight_controllers.name: Orqa 3030 Lite F405 Flight Controller - NDAA
flight_controllers.description: The Orqa 3030 Lite F405 Flight Controller offers high-performance features and is made in the EU with full NDAA compliance.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid H7 Flight Controller - ICM42688
flight_controllers.description: The TBS Lucid H7 FC is a powerhouse built for those who crave peak performance and adaptability in their drones.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 255 AIO - F4 FC + 50A 3-6S AM32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 255 AIO F4 FC + 50A 3-6S AM32 ESC combines high performance and convenience for modern FPV drone builds.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid Wing AIO - H7 FC + 50A 2-6S AM32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The TBS Lucid Wing AIO - H7 FC + 50A 2-6S AM32 ESC is your quick plug & play wing FC for big wings!

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU ERVT 5-in-1 AIO - F405 FC + 1S 5A ESC + 400mw VTX + ELRS RX + OSD
flight_controllers.description: Flywoo GOKU ERVT 5-in-1 AIO  – A revolutionary all-in-one solution.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN745 V3 AIO - F7 FC + 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 25X25
flight_controllers.description: The GOKU GN745 AIO has been Flywoo's flagship AIO, highly praised by Betaflight, INAV, and Ardupilot users. Now, the V3 version takes it to the next level!

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter 6-in-1 AIO - F722 FC + 40A ESC
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC Specter 6-in-1 AIO is a high-performance all-in-one flight controller built specifically for Y6, hexacopter, and other complex multirotor configurations. Combining an F722 flight controller with a powerful 40A 6-channel ESC, the Specter eliminates messy wiring while delivering unmatched power and reliability.

flight_controllers.name: AxisFlying Argus F745 AIO - F745 FC + 40A 4-6S AM32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The AxisFlying Argus F745 AIO - F745 FC + 40A 4-6S AM32 ESC is a top-tier flight control system.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel SuperX AIO V2 - F4 + 5A 1S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS 2.4GHz
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel SuperX F4 5A AIO V2 is an all-in-one flight controller built for 1S micro drones, combining an F4 MCU, 5A BLHeli_S ESCs, ExpressLRS 2.4GHz receiver, 5.8GHz OpenVTX (up to 400mW), and Betaflight OSD in a compact 25.5x25.5mm layout.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX MINI F7 V2 Mini Flight Controller - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX MINI F7 V2 Mini Flight Controller packs powerful performance into a compact 5g, 20x20mm form factor — perfect for both micro and full-sized drones.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid H7 Flight Controller - ICM42688 - NDAA
flight_controllers.description: Unleash the full potential of your drone with the NDAA Compliant TBS Lucid H7 Flight Controller — engineered for peak performance and versatility.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX F765 Flight Controller - NDAA
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX F765 Flight Controller is your ultimate solution for high-performance multirotor builds, offering robust features and seamless compatibility with Betaflight, Ardupilot, and PX4. Designed in the USA.

flight_controllers.name: Flycolor SpeedyPizza CrustCore Stack - F7 FC + 60A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Flycolor SpeedyPizza CrustCore Stack delivers high-performance flight control and powerful ESC capabilities in a compact 20x20mm form factor. Featuring an F7 flight controller with the ICM42688 gyro, this stack ensures ultra-precise handling and smooth performance.

flight_controllers.name: HDZero Halo H743 Flight Controller - MPU6000 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The HDZero Halo H743 Flight Controller is a compact, high-performance board powered by the H743 MCU, featuring an integrated true diversity ELRS receiver for seamless connectivity.

flight_controllers.name: HDZero Halo H743 Flight Controller ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The HDZero Halo H743 Flight Controller is a compact, high-performance board powered by the H743 MCU, featuring an integrated true diversity ELRS receiver for seamless connectivity.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO - F7 FC + 50A AM32 2-6S ESC - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO AM32 F7 Flight Controller and ESC is DJI HD system ready with an onboard 10v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug-and-play configuration.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone BeeBrain BLV5 AIO - G4 FC + 18A 1-2S 4-in-1 Bluejay ESC - MPU6000 - 25X25
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone BeeBrain BLV5 AIO Flight Controller with ExpressLRS 2.4G delivers cutting-edge innovation to the BeeBrain series. Featuring an STM32G474 MCU and 18A ESC running Bluejay 0.19.2 at 48kHz, it ensures precision, power, and durability.

flight_controllers.name: HDZero AIO5 - F4 FC + 5A 1S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS + VTX - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The HDZero AIO5 is the world’s first digital video AIO, enabling bind-and-fly 65mm whoops to weigh less than 19.4g.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX Tinyhawk Nanoscout AIO - F4 FC + 6A 1S ESC + 400mW VTX + ELRS RX
flight_controllers.description: The EMAX Tinyhawk Nanoscout AIO combines an F4 FC, 6A 1S ESC, 400mW VTX, and ELRS RX for precise control, efficient power, clear video, and long-range connectivity.

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC FETtec Alpha G4 Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The GEPRC FETtec Alpha G4 Flight Controller is a high-performance, versatile controller featuring the STM32G473CEU6 MCU and ICM 42602 IMU for precise control and stability.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone Infinity AIO - F7 FC + 45A 2-6S BLHeli_32 ESC - MPU6000 - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone Infinity AIO is a powerful F7 flight controller and 45A BLHeli_32 ESC combo, designed for unmatched performance and reliability in FPV builds.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO - G4 FC + 35A AM32 3-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO G4 Flight Controller + ESC is a powerful AIO ready to power the DJI O3 in a simple configuration. It also works great on standard analog systems with the onboard analog OSD chip.

flight_controllers.name: DYS F722 Flight Controller - ICM42688P - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The DYS F7 Flight Controller features an STM32F722 MCU, an ICM42688P gyroscope, a BMP280 barometer, and an AT7456E OSD.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter AIO - F722 FC - 25A 3-6S ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: Experience unparalleled flight performance with the HGLRC Specter AIO, designed to elevate your flying experience.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid Freestyle F4 Mini Flight Controller - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The TBS Lucid Freestyle Mini Flight Controller is the latest in product engineering at TBS, built for racing and freestyle applications and developed to cater to the needs of both seasoned pilots and enthusiastic newcomers.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X Pro FC Module
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6X Pro FC Module is an advanced flight controller system perfect for modern UAV applications.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F7 V1.1 AIO Board - F745 FC + 55A 2-6S Bluejay ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the iFlight BLITZ series AIO FCs for your ultimate build. A future-proof all-in-one FC to step up the game and make some more room for future flight firmware development like Betaflight, Emuflight, etc.

flight_controllers.name: Flycolor Raptor AIO - F7 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the Flycolor Raptor AIO, an all-in-one flight controller designed for FPV racing and freestyle enthusiasts, featuring the powerful F7 Flight Controller for precise control and stability.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX Tinyhawk III Plus AIO - F411 FC + 6A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the EMAX Tinyhawk III Plus AIO - the ultimate micro FPV racing upgrade.

flight_controllers.name: DarwinFPV HULK AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the DarwinFPV HULK AIO: a top-tier all-in-one solution designed for the HULK Waterproof Cinematic FPV Drone.

flight_controllers.name: Darwinfpv Cement F722 Flight Controller Icm42688
flight_controllers.description: Introducing Darwin FPV's "Cement" Flight Controller: the ultimate solution for professional pilots, addressing the reliability issues of FPV drones.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone X FETTec Infinity AIO - G4 FC (MPU6000) + 45A 3-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone X FETTec Infinity G4 3-6S 45A AIO (MPU6000) flight controller is a robust, high-performance solution that ensures reliability and protection for your drone, enabling you to fly confidently in any environment.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter AIO - F722 FC + 40A 4-6S ESC - MPU6000
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC Specter 40A 4-6S AIO - MPU6000 is a high-performance all-in-one flight controller, integrating advanced control and gyroscopic features.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter AIO - F411 ELRS FC + 10A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + 400mw VTX
flight_controllers.description: The HLRC Specter AIO is a remarkable piece of technology, combining an ultra-light F411 10A 1-2S AIO brushless flight controller, a cutting-edge SPI ExpressLRS 2.4G receiver with patch ceramic antennas, and a versatile 400mW 5.8GHz adjustable power video transmission.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor H7 Mini Flight Controller (HD + Analog) - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor H7 Mini Flight Controller is compact and feature-packed, designed for various drone applications.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Pacer Alpha G4 Flight Controller - HD 30.5x30.5
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor Pacer Alpha G4 is a flight controller with a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern. This HD version allows plug-and-play with the O3 Air unit for a no-solder build.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ (IMU V8)
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange (IMU V8) is an advanced flight controller autopilot module. This is the Cube only and needs to be paired with a carrier board.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC M100 Mini GPS
flight_controllers.description: Using the new 10th-generation UBLOX chip design, the HGLRC M100 GPS positioning is fast and accurate. The small 15x15mm size can be loaded on 2-7 inch drones. The ceramic antenna and externally expanded PCB design allow M100 MINI GPS to receive satellite signals effectively.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Module
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Module is the latest update to the successful family of Holybro's Pixhawk flight controllers.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight Defender 25 BLITZ AIO - H7 FC + 20A ESC + OSD
flight_controllers.description: This iFlight BLITZ H7 AIO is a new generation board designed for the Defender 25. Featuring an H7 flight controller, 20 ESC, and OSD.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX F4 HD Ultimate Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX F4 HD Ultimate Flight Controller is full of features including a plug for DJI HD system, 3rd generation IMU ICM42688-P, dual plug-and-play 4in1 ESC ports, 12x PWM outputs, barometer, OSD, 6x UARTs, 9-16V BEC, dual analog camera inputs, easy soldering layout and much more...

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F7 V1.2 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The iFlight BLITZ F7 V1.1 Flight Controller now has a new gyro, improved circuit design, better components, and lower noise level!

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel X12 AIO 5-in-1 Board - F4 FC + 12A ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel X12 is a 5-in-1 AIO board featuring an F4 Flight Controller, onbard 12A 4-in-1 ESC, 5.8GHz OpenVTX, and three different receiver options: PNP, FrSky, or ELRS. This AIO is great for brushless whoops with its great RX an VTX range!

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO - G4 FC + 35A AM32 3-6S ESC - Solderless
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO G4 Flight Controller + ESC is a powerful solderless AIO ready to power the DJI O3 in a simple configuration.

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC F722 AIO - F722 FC+ 35A 2S-6S BLS ESC
flight_controllers.description: The GEPRC F722 AIO is equipped with an F722 FC and 35A 2S-6S BLS ESC. This AIO stack adopts MCU STM32F722, which gives a powerful performance and higher computing speed.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel ExpressLRS F4 5A 5-in-1 AIO FC w/ Built-in 2.4GHz Rx
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel ExpressLRS F4 is the world's first AIO 5-in-1 whoop flight controller with a built-in high-performance 2.4GHz ELRS receiver. This F4 flight controller has a built-in 5A ESC, 5.8GHz VTX, and OSD. This AIO is made for 1S long-range and tiny whoops.

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC F4530D 3-6S HD Flight Controller for DJI
flight_controllers.description: The HAKRC F4530D Flight Controller provides great power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern. Features MPU6000, MATEK405 4.1 Betaflight, STM32F405RGT6 processor, and other cool features! Compatible with DJI Digital FPV.

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC F7230D 3-6S HD Flight Controller for DJI
flight_controllers.description: The HAKRC F7230D Flight Controller provides great power all in a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern. Features MPU6000/ICM20602, MATEK722 4.1 Betaflight, STM32F722RET6 processor, and other cool features! Compatible with DJI Digital FPV.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot ADS-B Standard Carrier Board
flight_controllers.description: The CubePilot ADS-B Carrier Board allows the software to receive information about the location of manned aircraft in the area. Made to work well with the Cube Autopilot.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU Pro Mini Stack - F7 FC + 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU Pro Mini Stack is a high-performance 20x20mm flight stack featuring an F7 flight controller and a 45A 2-6S AM32 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: HDZero AIO15 - G4 FC + 15A ESC + ELRS 2.4GHz RX + 200mW VTX
flight_controllers.description: The HDZero AIO15 is the world’s first all-in-one digital FPV flight system built for 2S–3S tiny whoops and micro freestyle drones. Combining a flight controller, 15A 4-in-1 ESC, HDZero digital VTX, built-in ExpressLRS receiver, and BEC into a compact 31.3×31.3mm board, it delivers powerful performance in an ultra-lightweight form.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel SuperX HD AIO - F411 FC +12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS
flight_controllers.description: Discover the efficiency and reliability of the Happymodel SuperX HD ELRS 12A 1-2S AIO for HD Whoop, tailored explicitly for dedicated FPV enthusiasts.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight Defender 25 BLITZ Split GPS
flight_controllers.description: The iFlight Defender 25 BLITZ Split GPS is an innovative GPS module tailored for seamless integration with the Defender25 drone.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid Pro F4 Mini Flight Controller - MPU6000 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The TBS Lucid Pro F4 Mini Flight Controller is the latest in product engineering at TBS, built for racing and freestyle applications and developed to cater to the needs of both seasoned pilots and enthusiastic newcomers.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU Stack - F722 FC (ICM42688) + 55A AM32 2-6S ESC - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The new GOKU Pro V2 F722 AM32 55A BLS Stack from FLYWOO offers a compact size, high-performance main control, and multiple motor outputs.

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Air 5-in-1 AIO - G4 FC + 1S ESC + 400mW VTX + ELRS RX + OSD
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV Air Brushless Flight Controller is the first 1S FC with the STM32G473CEU6, which offers a 55% boost in computing speed and lightning-fast response times, outpacing the F411.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F722 PRO V2 Flight Controller - ICM42688
flight_controllers.description: The new GOKU F722 PRO V2 Flight Controller from FLYWOO offers a compact size, high-performance main control, and multiple motor outputs.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F405-WMN Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Matek's F405-WMN (Wing Mini) board is a great flight controller for those looking to save space and weight on their builds.  It puts pretty much all features from a full-size board on something that measures just 31x26x16mm.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F722 PRO MINI V2 Flight Controller - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The new GOKU F722 PRO MINI V2 Flight Controller from FLYWOO offers a compact size, high-performance main control, and multiple motor outputs.

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC AIO Board - Brushless F722 FC + 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC w/ External USB
flight_controllers.description: This HAKRC AIO Board features a brushless F722 flight controller and a 40A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC. This version carries an external USB. This is an ultra-light 7g brushless AIO flight controller!! This FC has a strong performance and can handle 40A continuous current and up to 6S.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazy F405 AIO - F4 HD FC + 12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel Crazy F405 AIO - F4 HD FC + 12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS is a flight controller that seamlessly combines an F4 HD Flight Controller, a 12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC, and an embedded Serial ELRS receiver.

flight_controllers.name: Skystars F722 HD Pro 3 DJI Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The Skystars F722 HD Pro 3 Flight Controller - 30x30 is a FC with a modern F7 processor. This FC uses a gyro BMI270 and has 8MB of memory for Blackbox and 5V / 3A and 10V / 3A BEC.

flight_controllers.name: Frsky GPS ADV Telemetry Sensor
flight_controllers.description: FrSky has enhanced the performance and capability of the original sensor line, resulting in the development of the new ADVANCE (ADV) FrSky GPS ADV Telemetry Sensor.

flight_controllers.name: SkyStars F722 Mini HD Pro 3-6S Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The SkyStars F722 Mini HD Pro flight controller features an F7 processor, OSD, and a 16MB Blackbox with a 20x20 mounting pattern!

flight_controllers.name: Hobbywing XRotor F7 Convertible Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The XRotor F7 Convertible Flight Controller from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system. The mounting pattern is convertible between 20x20 and 30.5x30.5!

flight_controllers.name: Aikon F7 AIO Board - F7 FC + 60A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Aikon F7 AIO Board - F7 FC + 60A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC is a new generation flight controller and ESC combination specifically designed for cinewhoops and other high-current applications. All the greatest features into one seamless flight experience!

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Lite 1S Whoop Flight Controller - Frsky
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel CrazyBee F4 Lite Flight Controller brings lots of power in a small package. This 4-in-1 FC comes with an integrated receiver (FrSky), ESC, and an onboard 5.8GHz VTX!

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN405 Nano V3 F4 HD Flight Controller w/ ELRS 2.4GHz - 16x16
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU GN405 Nano V3 F4 HD Flight Controller is upgraded for enhanced performance and a more compact layout. Featuring a USB-C port, it ensures seamless connectivity with mainstream cables.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ E80 Pro G2 80A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC w/ Cover - 35x35/30x30
flight_controllers.description: The iFlight BLITZ E80 uses a MOSFET PSMN1R0-40YLD, which can withstand a continuous current of 80A at 25°C, with a maximum power dissipation of 198W.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F4 Whoop AIO Board - F411 FC + 5A 1S ESC + 50mW VTX + ELRS 2.4Ghz RX
flight_controllers.description: This is the new iFlight BLITZ series AIO FC for your ultimate build. A future-proof all-in-one FC featuring an F411 flight controller, 5A ESC, 50mW VTX, and a built-in ELRS receiver.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX BabyHawk II HD BLHeli_S F4 2-4S 25A  AIO FC + ESC
flight_controllers.description: This Emax AIO Flight Controller + ESC is a replacement part for the EMAX BabyHawk II HD Freestyle RTF.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ Mini Set
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange + Mini Set is an advanced flight controller solution combining the Cube Orange autopilot module and a compact Mini Carrier Board.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F745 V1.1 Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the iFlight Blitz F745 V1.1 Flight Controller, a compact powerhouse designed for drone enthusiasts.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ Standard Set
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange+ Standard Set (IMU V8) features a high-performance H7 processor and the 1090MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix.

flight_controllers.name: HDZero Gamma AIO – G473 FC + 45A AM32 ESC + ELRS RX
flight_controllers.description: The HDZero Gamma HD-Ready AIO is built on the STM32G473 MCU, using the 25.5x25.5mm Whoop/Toothpick pattern and optimized for 2.5–4 inch drones.

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Matrix 4-in-1 AIO - G473 FC + 12A 1S ESC + ELRS RX + OSD - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV Matrix 4-in-1 AIO - G473 FC + 12A 1S ESC + ELRS RX + OSD redefines 1S whoop performance.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange+ is an advanced flight controller autopilot module. This is the Cube only and needs to be paired with a carrier board.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone HummingBird V4 AIO - F4 FC + 12A 1S 4-in-1 BLHeliS ESC + ELRS RX + 400mW VTX - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone HummingBird V4 AIO is a compact, high-performance 25x25mm flight controller built for micro racing and freestyle.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight Borg 5S F4 Flight Controller w/ ELRS 2.4GHz Rx - ICM42688 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: Engineered for elite FPV racing, the iFlight Borg 5S RX Flight Controller delivers high-performance control in a compact, reliable package.

flight_controllers.name: XILO Stax V3 F4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The XILO Stax V3 F4 Flight Controller combines powerful F4 processing power with a host of features such as receiver mounting and VTX remote power switching. Plug n' play allows stacking with your favorite 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Matrix 5-in-1 AIO - G4 FC + 1S ESC + 400mW VTX + ELRS RX + OSD
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the BETAFPV Matrix 1S Brushless AIO,  a beginner-friendly, integrated solution with a durable 1mm-thick board and built-in motor plug for easy installation.

flight_controllers.name: Axisflying Argus Pro Plug-n-Play Stack - F7 FC + 65A 3-6S BLHeli_32 ESC w/ Heatsink - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The Axisflying Argus Pro series combines durability and performance with an aluminum-wrapped, IP54-rated design to protect its PCB from dust and water.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee AIO - F4 FC + 40A 3-6S 4-in-1 Bluejay ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The SpeedyBee AIO - F4 FC + 40A 3-6S 4-in-1 Bluejay ESC combines a high-performance STM32F405 flight controller with a 40A ESC, supporting 3-6S LiPo batteries and DSHOT600/300 protocols.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute H743-Fixed Wing Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Kakute H743 Wing is a fully-featured flight controller specifically designed for fixed-wing and VTOL applications.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC v2A Standard Set - ICM-45686
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Module v2A Standard Set is a compact, high-performance flight controller for advanced UAV applications.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X Mini FC Module - ICM-45686
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk Mini 6X FC Module Mini Set is a compact, high-performance flight controller for advanced UAV applications.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Module v2B Standard Set - ICM-45686
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Module v2B Standard Set is a compact, high-performance flight controller for advanced UAV applications.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX Tinyhawk III Plus AIO - F411 FC + 6A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + SPI ELRS RX (Freestyle)
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the EMAX Tinyhawk III Plus AIO - the ultimate micro FPV racing upgrade.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Pacer H743 Flight Controller - MPU6000 - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor Pacer H743 Flight Controller delivers top performance with the reliable MPU6000 gyro for stable and precise control.

flight_controllers.name: Skystars Jupiter AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S  ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The Skystars Jupiter F405 45A AIO is a robust board that combines a flight controller and ESCs, with a 25.5 x 25.5mm mount, suitable for 3-4" and lightweight 5" drones.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX H7 HD Ultimate Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX H7 HD Ultimate Flight Controller is full of features including, dual plug-and-play 4in1 ESC ports, 13 PWM outputs, barometer, OSD, 7x UARTs, SD Card slot, CAN bus, 5v and 9v BEC, dual camera inputs, easy soldering layout and much more...

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F745 Mini Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the iFlight BLITZ F745 Mini Flight Controller - 20x20, a compact powerhouse designed for drone enthusiasts.

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC TAKER AIO - F411 FC + 12A 2-4S ESC + Built-in ELRS 2.4GHz
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the TAKER F411 8Bit 12A AIO, revolutionizing MINI FPV with its lightweight integrated board at only 7 grams.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Velox F7 SE Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the T-Motor Velox F7 SE Flight Controller, engineered for precision and performance in aerial applications.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute F722 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the Holybro Kakute F722 Flight Controller – a pinnacle of precision and performance for drone enthusiasts.

flight_controllers.name: CUAV V5 Nano Autopilot Drone Flight Controller - PX4 APM
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the CUAV V5 Nano Autopilot Drone Flight Controller, a compact yet powerful autopilot engineered by CUAV and PX4 teams for space-conscious drone enthusiasts and professionals.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter F722 Mini HD Flight Controller - MPU6000 - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC Specter F722 Mini HD Flight Controller - MPU6000 is a culmination of over a year's technology development, offering an optimized design and improved circuitry for a refined flying experience.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute G4 AIO - G4 FC + 35A AM32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Kakute G4 AIO 35A Flight Controller (AM32) is a highly integrated and advanced All-in-One (AIO) board, combining a powerful flight controller and a 4in1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Durandal FC Module - ICM20602
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Durandal is a high-performance flight controller designed by Holybro, featuring the advanced STM32H7 microcontroller series.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C Mini FC Module (Model A Pins)
flight_controllers.description: The Pixhawk® 6C Mini is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk® flight controllers, based on the Pixhawk® FMUv6C Open Standard and Connector Standard.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone Hummingbird V3 AIO - F411 FC + 12A BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS + VTX
flight_controllers.description: The NewBeeDrone Hummingbird V3 AIO Flight Controller is designed to be compatible with the Hummingbird F4 V2 ELRS BNF or Hummingbird F4 V3 ELRS BNF drone, ensuring seamless integration with the Hummingbird Mark3 VtxCamera.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU Stack - GN405S FC (ICM42688) 20A ESC AIO + HM850 850MW Microphone VTX
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo Goku Stack is a high-performance, all-in-one solution for your FPV drone.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 V4 Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: Elevate your drone's performance with the SpeedyBee F405 V4 Flight Controller, featuring STM32F405 MCU and ICM42688P gyro for precise control.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter F405 Flight Controller (MPU6000) - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC Specter F405 Flight Controller is designed to cater to freestyle and racing drones, offering an impressive balance of performance and ease of use.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba MINI MK4 F722 Flight Controller - MPU6000
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone MK4 F722 MINI FC (MPU6000) is the latest evolution in the renowned MK series, bringing forth a slew of improvements that enhance user experience and flight performance.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazy F411 AIO - F4 FC + 20A ESC + OSD - ELRS 2.4GHz
flight_controllers.description: The CrazyF411 ELRS flight controller has an integrated UART 2.4GHz ExpressLRS receiver and a 20A Blheli_s ESC with the Bluejay firmware pre-installed.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone MK4 F722 APP (WiFi) Flight Controller - MPU6000
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 is an F722 flight controller.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO - G4 FC + 35A BLHeli_32 3-6S ESC - Solderless
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO G4 Flight Controller + ESC is a powerful solderless AIO ready to power the DJI O3 in a simple configuration.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F7 AIO - F722 FC + 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC (HD + Analog) - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor F7 AIO is a compact flight controller featuring advanced components such as an onboard ESC with Bluejay & BLHeli_S firmware, a quality MPU series gyroscope for improved noise reduction, 16MB Black Box space, and an integrated barometer.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F7 AIO - F722 FC + 45A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC (HD + Analog) - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor F7 AIO is a compact flight controller featuring advanced components such as an onboard ESC with Bluejay & BLHeli_S firmware, a quality MPU series gyroscope for improved noise reduction, 16MB Black Box space, and an integrated barometer.

flight_controllers.name: Axisflying Argus F7 AIO - F722 FC + 40A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The Axisflying Argus F7 AIO is a top-tier flight control system encased in a durable aluminum shell, boasting high-quality circuit technology.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba MK4 F740 AIO - F722 BASIC FC + 40A 6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the Diatone Mamba MK4 AIO - F740 BASIC FC + 40A 6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 25x25. This is a full-featured all-in-one flight controller and ESC that is perfect for Sub 250g, 3, 4, and 5-inch quads.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba MK4 F740 AIO - F722 WIFI FC + 40A 6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the Diatone Mamba MK4 AIO - F740 WIFI FC + 40A 6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 25x25. This is a full-featured all-in-one flight controller and ESC that is perfect for Sub 250g, 3, 4, and 5-inch quads.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone BeeBrain BLV4 AIO - F411 FC + 12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + Built-In TBS Crossfire
flight_controllers.description: The BeeBrain BLV4 AIO Flight Controller integrates an F411 flight controller, a 12AMP 4-In-1 BLHeli_S ESC, a 5.8GHz VTX, and a TBS Crossfire receiver onto a compact 29x29mm platform.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Pacer Alpha G4 Flight Controller - Analog 30.5x30.5
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor Pacer Alpha G4 is a flight controller with a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Superbee F4 Lite AIO - F411 FC + 5A 1S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: This Happymodel Superbee F4 Lite is the next big thing in ultralight AIOs! This board features a built-in SPI receiver, available in SPI ELRS 2.4GHz or SPI FrSky versions.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X Fc Standard Set
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Standard Set is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk flight controllers. This is the 6X Set with a Standard Base Board.

flight_controllers.name: Axisflying Argus Pro F722 Plug & Play 3-6S Flight Controller w/ Aluminum Box - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The Axisflying Argus Pro F722 Plug & Play 3-6S Flight Controller w/ Aluminum Box - 30x30 is a chip that packs a serious punch.

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC SPAN F722 HD Bluetooth V2 Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The GEPRC SPAN F722 HD Bluetooth V2 Flight Controller - 30x30 supports direct plug-in the DJI Air Unit, which can save the trouble of soldering.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot Cube Purple
flight_controllers.description: CubePilot Cube Purple (also known as Cube Mini) is an autopilot system designed specifically for land-based applications such as boats, cars, or rovers.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazy F411 Pro V1.1 AIO - F4 FC + 20A ESC + OSD - FrSky
flight_controllers.description: This Happymodel Crazy F411 Pro V1.1 AIO is a 6.3g 2-4S AIO with an F4 flight controller, built-in 20/25A per channel ESC, and FrSky diversity receiver.

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV F722 V2 AIO - F722 FC + 35A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV F722 V2 AIO - F722 FC + 35A BLHeli_S 2-6S ESC is very reliable to meet your advanced FPV needs. This board comes with an F722 chip and provides great performance capability and high processing speed, which brings pilots a stable and smooth flight.

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC F7220 AIO - F722 FC + 40A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC + 5V/3A 10V 2.5A BEC
flight_controllers.description: Experience the ultimate in-flight control with the HAKRC F7220 AIO - F722 FC + 40A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC + 5V/3A 10V 2.5A BEC. This ultra-powerful 20x20mm board is capable of handling the most demanding of tasks, delivering unbeatable performance and reliability.

flight_controllers.name: ZEEZ F7 2020 V3 Flight Controller - Mini 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The ZEEZ F7 2020 V3 Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 features an 8 Motor Output and is DJI HD System Ready with an on-board 9V@3A regulator to power the DJI Air Unit.

flight_controllers.name: FlightOne Lightning H7 500MHz Flight Controller - Connector/Plug Version
flight_controllers.description: The Lightning H7 500MHz Flight Controller by FlightOne comes with an H7 processor that is 10x faster than an F7 processor, which makes this FC one of the best flight controllers in the market!

flight_controllers.name: FlightOne Lightning H7 500MHz Flight Controller - Solder Only Version
flight_controllers.description: The Lightning H7 500MHz Flight Controller by FlightOne comes with an H7 processor that is 10x faster than an F7 processor, which makes this FC one of the best flight controllers in the market!

flight_controllers.name: Diatone MAMBA MK4 F405 Mini Flight Controller (ICM42688P)
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the Mamba F405 MINI MK4 Flight Controller from Diatone. The pad style has been redesigned to increase pad area by 30% and pad spacing by 100%, reducing solder errors and associated failures. It's an all-around easier-to-use flight controller that includes an ICM42688P Gyro.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone MAMBA MK4 F722 Mini Flight Controller (ICM42688P)
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 Mini is an F722 Flight Controller with an ICM4268P8 Gyro, making this FC the perfect addition to your FPV build.

flight_controllers.name: SkyStars F405 Mini HD 2 DJI 3-6S Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The SkyStars F405 Mini HD 2 flight controller features Betaflight OSD and DJI HD OSD with a 20x20 mounting pattern!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Toothpick F722 AIO V1.1 - F722 FC + 35A BLHeli_S 2-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV F722 35A 2-6S AIO is a very reliable FC that is made to meet your advanced FPV needs. This AIO comes with an F722 chip and BLHeli_S ESC firmware.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU Versatile F405 AIO - F405 FC + 12A BLHELI_S 1-2S ESC - No Rx (MPU6000)
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU Versatile F405 AIO features a 2S 12A ESC, OSD, 6 serial ports I2C functionality, and 2XWS2812 LEDs. Building made easy in a compact whoop board!

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F405 AIO - F405 FC + 12A BLHELI_S 1-2S ESC w/ ELRS 2.4GHz Rx (MPU6000)
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU F405 AIO features a built-in ELRS 2.4g RX, 2S 12A ESC, OSD, 6 serial ports I2C functionality, and 2XWS2812 LEDs. Building made easy in a compact whoop board!

flight_controllers.name: Foxeer F722 V4 Pro Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Foxeer F722 V4 Pro Flight Controller features 20x20mm mounting with an excellent layout and great filtering.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F405-TE Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The MATEKSYS F405-TE Flight Controller features a 30.5 x 30.5mm mounting pattern and weighs 10g.

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ Standard Set ADS-B (IMU V8)
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange+ Standard Set (IMU V8) features a high-performance H7 processor and the 1090MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute H7 V2 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Kakute H7 V2.1 Flight Controller is full of features including integrated Bluetooth, HD camera plug, dual plug-and-play 4in1 ESC ports, 9V VTX ON/OFF Pit Switch, barometer, OSD, 6x UARTs, 128MB Flash for Logging, 5V and 9V BEC, and bigger soldering pad with easy layout and much more.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6X FC Mini Set
flight_controllers.description: The Pixhawk 6X is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk flight controllers. This is the 6X Set with a Mini Base Board.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F7 Pro V1.1 Flight Controller - 35x35
flight_controllers.description: The iFlight BLITZ F722 Pro V1.1 flight controller features an improved circuit design, better components, and lower electrical noise. This FC is plug-and-play with DJI and has FC LED indicators, a 512Mb Black box, and an LC filter.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight BLITZ F7 V2 AIO Board - F745 FC + 55A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: This is the new iFlight BLITZ series AIO FC for your ultimate build. A future-proof all-in-one FC will step up the game and make more room for future flight firmware development like Betaflight, Emuflight, etc. Featuring an F745 FC and 55A ESC.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro DroneCAN M8N GPS
flight_controllers.description: The DroneCAN M8N GPS is the primary CAN protocol used by the ArduPilot and PX4 projects for communication with CAN peripherals. It is an open protocol with open communication, specification, and multiple open implementations.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pix32 V6 Modular Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Pix32 V6 Modular Flight Controller is the latest update to the pix32 v5 flight controllers.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone MAMBA MK4 F722 APP (WiFi) Flight Controller - BMI270
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 is an F722 flight controller. With WiFi capabilities through the SpeedyBee APP, this stack is the perfect addition to your FPV build. This version has a BMI270 Gyro.

flight_controllers.name: Foxeer Mini F722 V3 Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Foxeer Mini F722 V3 is a 20x20 plug-and-play flight controller with a BMI270 gyro.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN405S AIO - F405 BMI270 FC + 40A BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU GN405S Flight Controller is an economical and durable AIO, which can meet most of your FPV needs. This AIO boasts a powerful F405 Flight Controller and 40A BLHeli_S Electronic Speed Controller.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone MAMBA MK4 F722 APP (WiFi) Flight Controller - ICM42688P
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba MK4 is an F722 flight controller. With WiFi capabilities through the SpeedyBee APP, this stack is the perfect addition to your FPV build. This version has an IMC42688P Gyro.

flight_controllers.name: Bardwell F7 V2 3-6S 30x30 Flight Controller - JBF7 V2
flight_controllers.description: The Bardwell F7 V2 Flight Controller (JBF7 V2) features an F7 processor, ICM20602 Gyro, several DC power outputs, and 8 motor pads. The V2 now features USB-C, a VTX pit switch, solderless plugs, a barometer, iNav support, and LEDs.

flight_controllers.name: Zeez F7 3030 V3 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The ZEEZ F7 V3 3030 is an 8 Motor Output, DJI HD System Ready Flight Controller with an on-board 9V@3A regulator to power the DJI Air Unit, with a simple plug-and-play configuration and 5V@3A regulator to power all the peripheral.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F745 AIO Board - F745 FC + 35A BLHeli_S 3-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The SpeedyBee F745 AIO includes an F745 flight controller and a 35A ESC. Featuring a BMP280 barometer, OSD, 8MB Memory Blackbox, and MPU600 Gyro... this AIO board is the perfect addition to your FPV build.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor VELOX Lite F411 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor VELOX Lite F411 Flight Controller is a mini and budget-friendly flight controller that is equipped with 5V 2A BEC, AT 7456E OSD chip, and 8M black box.

flight_controllers.name: CUAV V5+ Standard Autopilot Flight Controller - PX4/APM
flight_controllers.description: The CUAV V5+® is an advanced autopilot manufactured by CUAV®.

flight_controllers.name: CUAV X7+ Standard Autopilot Flight Controller - PX4/APM
flight_controllers.description: The X7+® Standard Autopilot Flight Controller is a high-performance autopilot. It is an ideal choice for industrial drones and large-scale heavy-duty drones. The X7+ features an H7 processor, an upgraded sensor with a redundancy design, a temperature compensation system, and a CORE separate design.

flight_controllers.name: FETtec G4 - N v1.7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The FETtec FC G4 - N v1.7 features the latest STM32G4 processor. Providing unparalleled processing power to your aircraft. Along with an IIM-42652 SPI gyro, two 5v BECs, 6-27V (2-6S) power handling, and a host of other features, the G4 from FETtec is on the cutting edge of Flight Controller technology. This version does not include the analog OSD. (Digital OSD supported)

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Diamond F4 ELRS 5-in-1 AIO Flight Controller - SPI ELRS 2.4GHz
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel Diamond F4 AIO 5-IN-1 Flight Controller has a built-in VTX, ESC, OSD, and receiver - all on one triangle-shaped whoop board!

flight_controllers.name: FETtec G4 35A AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: A powerful AIO board from FETtec in a small 20x20 mounted package.

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU F7-XSD Pro DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Standard
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU F7-XSD Pro Flight Controller is designed with DJI pilots in mind! This standard version F7 FC is ultra-light at 4.7g and handles up to 6S batteries.

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU NOXE F411 V2 DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Standard
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU NOXE F4 V2 Flight Controller is made with DJI Pilots in mind. This standard version FC packs 2 UARTs, and a BEC into a mini-sized 20x20 board with 3-6S capabilities!

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU NOXE F411 V2 DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Deluxe
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU NOXE F4 V2 Flight Controller is made with DJI Pilots in mind. This Deluxe FC packs a 16MB Blackbox, Barometer, 2 UARTs, and BEC into a mini-sized 20x20 board with 3-6S capabilities!

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU AIO Board - GSF405A F4 FC + 5A 1-2S ESC w/ Built-in ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
