flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU GS405A AIO features an F4 FC and a 5A ESC with built-in ELRS 2.4GHz receiver. This is an ultra-light 3.3g brushless AIO flight controller with 25.5x25.5mm mounting pattern!! This FC can handle 5A of continuous current and up to 2S.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F7 PRO Flight Controller w/ WiFi + Bluetooth
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's F7 Pro Flight Controller has arrived! Enjoy full function in a wireless state! Great for cinematic professional use. This FC features 8 UARTS, WiFi and Bluetooth capabilites, and a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern.

flight_controllers.name: XILO Stax V2 F4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The XILO Stax V2 F4 Flight Controller combines powerful F4 processing power with a host of features such as receiver mounting and VTX remote power switching. Plug n' play allows stacking with your favorite 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: Axisflying F722 DJI Flight Controller w/ OSD - Mini 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Axisflying F722 Flight Controller is plug-and-play compatible for both Analog and HD and easily connects to a DJI FPV Air Unit. This FC has a 20x20 mounting pattern and features an MPU6000 Gyro, QMP6988 Barometer, and 5V 3A BEC.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GN405 20A AIO BL_S Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description:
Flywoo's new GOKU series AIO are finally here! The GOKU GN405 20A FC is an economical and durable all-in-one AIO, which can meet most of your FPV needs.
Uses a powerful F405 chip, integrated 5V BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 6 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions are available.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo Gn405 20A Aio Stack Hm850 Vtx
flight_controllers.description:
Flywoo's new GOKU series AIO are finally here! The GOKU GN405 20A FC is an economical and durable all-in-one AIO, which can meet most of your FPV needs.
Uses a powerful F405 chip, integrated 5V BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 6 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions are available.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN722 HD EVO 40A BL_S AIO Flight Controller (20x20)
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GN722 uses the powerful F722 chip accompanied by BLHELI_S ESC firmware. It is integrated with a 5V/9V dual BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 7 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions available.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Mini Racer 20x20 F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor Mini Racer F7 is a 3-6S 20x20 mini flight controller with a 16MB Blackbox flash memory, 5V.2A BEC, and an MPU6000 gyro. Designed for easy maintenance and low interference.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight Beast H743 V2 AIO Board - H743 FC + 55A BLHeli_S ESC (BMI270)
flight_controllers.description: This iFlight Beast H743 V2 AIO Board has an H743 Flight controller and a 55A BLHeli_S ESC.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC DJI Zeus F722 Mini 3-6S F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC DJI Zeus F722 Mini is a 20x20 flight controller that houses an BMI270 gyro and 3-6S direct LiPo support. Comes with an integrated barometer, 8M black box, and DJI connector.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight SucceX-D F7 TwinG V2.2 F722 Flight Controller - HD Version
flight_controllers.description: The iFlight SucceX-D F7 V2.2 is a 30.5x30.5 flight controller that has an F722 MCU and is designed to work seamlessly with DJI’s HD FPV system.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight SucceX-D Whoop V3.2 AIO Board - F4 FC + 20A BLHeli_S ESC (MPU6000)
flight_controllers.description: This iFlight SucceX-D V3.2 AIO Board has an F4 flight controller with a 20A BLHeli_S ESC. This whoop style board from iFlight is plug-n-play with the DJI Air Unit and Caddx Vista HD system.

flight_controllers.name: iFlight Beast F7 V2 55A AIO 25.5x25.5mm Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Beast F7 55A AIO V2 FC is iFlight's new innovation! The new Beast series of AIO FCs combines MCU speed with ESC for a bigger stack!

flight_controllers.name: FETtec FC G4 v1.7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The FETtec FC G4 v1.7 features the latest STM32G4 processor. Providing unparalleled processing power to your aircraft. Along with an IIM-42652 SPI gyro, two 5v BECs, 6-27V (2-6S) power handling, and a host of other features, the G4 from FETtec is on the cutting edge of Flight Controller technology.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba DJI F722 MK2 Flight Controller - Mini 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba DJI F722 MINI MK2 Flight Controller is a powerful yet small FC that is compatible with the DJI FPV System and related HD systems. The Mamba DJI F722 MINI MK2 FC is equipped with 216MHz STM32F722RET6 MCU, OSD, Dshot300/600/1200, barometer, 6 UARTS, and many other features that make this an excellent mini FC!

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba Basic F405 MINI MK3.5 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Diatone Mamba Basic F405 Mini MK3.5 20x20 Flight Controller is equipped with I2C function, large solder pads, 5 UARTS, Type-C USB, and Diatone has recently increased the camera VCC power supply pad and updated many features to meet your FPV needs!

flight_controllers.name: FETtec KISS G4-N AIO Board - G4-N FC + 35A 32bit 3-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The FETtec G4-N AIO is a powerful AIO board from FETtec, featuring a G473 flight controller and 35A ESC. This product has no onboard analog OSD, but the use of digital OSDs is still possible as usual.

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 45A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 25A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 25A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

flight_controllers.name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The Micro Combo features a 60A 4-in-1 ESC along with an updated F7 Flight Controller. This new FC is similar to other versions with its OSD, and voltage monitoring, but the F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system.

flight_controllers.name: Betafpv F4 1S 12A Aio Brushless Flight Controller Spi Frsky
flight_controllers.description: BETAFPV has come up with their F4 1S 12A AIO Flight Controller which is suitable for 3" lightweight builds and toothpick drones like the HX115 SE Toothpick Drone.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 FC + 50A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 Flight Controller + ESC is DJI HD system ready with an onboard 9v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug-and-play configuration.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel BeecoreX FR V1.0 AIO F4 5-in-1 Brushed Flight Controller /w VTX+RX
flight_controllers.description: The BeecoreX FR V1.0 is the ultimate 5-in-1 flight controller for a Brushed Tinywhoop and includes an F4 FC, VTX, ESC, frsky receiver, and betaflight OSD. This makes it very easy to build a brushed tiny whoop! Just add your FPV camera, brushed motors, frame, and propellers... then plug and play - no soldering required.

flight_controllers.name: Zeez V2 F7 3-6S 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Zeez F7 V2 2020 is an 8-Motor Output Flight Controller including an F7 processor designed with top-of-the-line hardware. This new V2 edition has improved stability and power supply cleaning. Pads are now easier to solder with added copper surrounding all pads to grant more strength. This FC is DJI HD System ready with a simple plug-and-play configuration. Get ready for the optimal flight experience with Zeez!

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 V3.1 2-4S 4-in-1 12A AIO Flight Controller - SPI Frsky
flight_controllers.description: The Crazybee F4 V3.1 Flight Controller comes pre-soldered with a Frsky SPI receiver and XT30 power wires. This flight controller is the default FC for the Happymodel Cine8 85mm Brushless CineWhoop, but great for other ultra-light micro drones that need space and weight savings.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU HEX F411 16x16 Flight Controller for Hexacopter
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU F411 Flight Controller (MPU6000) features 2 hardware UARTS, MPU6000, and an STM32F411 MCU. This great FC also has LEDs attached for lighting.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU HD745 EVO 40A AIO Stack + HM600 VTX
flight_controllers.description: FLYWOO's new EVO series aims to make AIOs the new hot thing in FPV - and looking at the features, it is hard to resist everything on one board!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Toothpick F405 V4.0 AIO Board - F405 2-6S FC + 20A BLHeli_32 ESC
flight_controllers.description: The new Toothpick F405 2-6S AIO 20A FC is a brushless flight controller. Compared with the V3 version, the new V4 board updates the F411 chip to F405. This item is ultralight and can be used with the toothpick drone or a cinewhoop quadcopter.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN745 AIO 40A BL32 Stack + HM600 VTX
flight_controllers.description: The GOKU GNF745 40A FC Stack is one of the most integrated and powerful whoop/toothpick AIO boards on the market! Perfect for ultralight quads and toothpicks.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel CrazybeeX V2.2 5A 1-2S AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Happymodel Crazybeex FR V2.2 is a 4-in-1 flight controller that comes with the Onboard 5.8GHz 40CH VTX, Onboard 5A 4-in-1 ESC, and you can choose FrSky receiver option or PNP.

flight_controllers.name: HOM FPV F411 20A 3-4S Blheli_S AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The HOMFPV AIO F411 F4 20A 3-4S Blheli_S Flight Controller Brushless ESC is a new Flight Controller from HOMFPV!

flight_controllers.name: HOM FPV F405 20A 2-4S BLHeli_S AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The F405 BLHeli_S 2-4S 20A AIO is a new flight controller by HOMFPV!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV F4 1S AIO Flight Controller w/ Integrated 25mW VTX (Frsky FCC)
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV F4 1S AIO FC (SPI Rx) features four key components: F411 FC, 5A ESC, 25mW VTX, and an SPI receiver.

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV F405 12A V3 BLHeli_S 2-4S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV F405 2-4S AIO 12A Brushless Flight Controller (BLHeli_S) V3 is a powerful FC that has been updated from an F411 chip to an F405 and can handle 12A continuous current (13A burst).

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F411 V2.1 16x16 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU F411 Flight Controller (MPU6000) features 2 hardware UARTS, MPU6000 (SPI) IMU, STM32F411 MCU, and supports serial receivers (SBUS, iBus, Spektrum, Crossfire) only.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX Nanohawk F4 5A 1S BL_S AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: A replacement or spare F4 AIO flight controller for the EMAX Nanohawk 1S Micro Brushless FPV Drone.

flight_controllers.name: SkyStars F405HD Mini 3-6S 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SkyStars F405HD Mini 3-6S 20x20 Flight Controller features 6 UARTS, MPU6000, STM32F705RGT6 MCU, SkyStars F405HD firmware and other cool specs! Compatible with DJI Digital HD FPV System.

flight_controllers.name: Bardwell F7 3-6S 30x30 Flight Controller - JBF7 FC
flight_controllers.description: The Bardwell F7 3-6S 30x30 Flight Controller - JBF7 FC features an F7 processor, ICM20602 Gyro, several DC power outputs, 8 motors pads, among other cool specs, plus support the DJI Digital HD FPV System.

flight_controllers.name: SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SkyStars F7 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller features 6 hardware UARTS (UART1,2,3,4,5,6), STM32F722RGT6 216MHz MCU, buzzer pad, barometer, Betaflight OSD & DJI HD OSD and supports DJI!

flight_controllers.name: SkyStars F7 3-6S 30x30 HD Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SkyStars F7 3-6S 30x30 HD Flight Controller features 6 UARTS, MPU6000, 8MB BlackBox, Betaflight OSD & DJI HD OSD, and many other features!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV F722 AIO V1 - F722 FC + 35A 2-6S BLHeli_S ESC
flight_controllers.description: This FC comes with an F722 chip, BLHELI_S ESC firmware, and a board that provides a better performance capability and higher calculation speed, bringing pilots a more stable and smoother flight.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Kakute F7 HDV AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Holybro Kakute F7 HDV All-In-One (AIO) is designed to work with the DJI Digital HD FPV System.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F722-WPX Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Matek F722-WPX Flight Controller features STM32F722, MPU6000, DPS310, Pixel OSD, SD Blackbox, 10x PWM outputs, 6x UARTs, I2C, and a Camera switch.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-SLIM Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Matek H743-SLIM Flight Controller features STM32H743VI, ICM42605 & MPU6000, DPS310, OSD, 7x UARTs, 2x I2C, 1xCAN, 13x PWM outputs, BEC5V and other cool features!

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC F4120 35A 3-6S BLHELI_S AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The HAKRC F4120 AIO Flight Controller provides great power all in a 20x20 mounting pattern

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Pacer F7 USB-C Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's Pacer F7 USB-C Flight Controller is designed to work seamlessly with the F45A 2.0, F55A Pro II，V45A，P50A, P60A 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU GHF420AIO 20A BLHELI_S 2-6S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU GHF420AIO 20A FC is a new ultra-light 7.9g brushless AIO flight controller!

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU GHF411 Pro 35A BLHELI_S 3-6S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The JHEMCU GH411 35A FC is a new ultra-light 7.3g brushless AIO flight controller!

flight_controllers.name: Zeez Design F7 2020 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Zeez Design F7 2020 Flight Controller is built with TM32F722 MCU for best performance and it supports almost all firmware on the market, like Betaflight, EmuFlight, and INAV.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F411-WSE Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: This F4 Flight Controller features TM32F411, MPU6000, BMP280, OSD, 2x UARTs, 2x Softserial_TX, I2C, 2x Motors & 4x Servos, 2x BEC, Camera switcher.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F722 Flight Controller for DJI Digital FPV System
flight_controllers.description: The Matek's line of F7 flight controllers brings a host of new possibilities to your fixed wing or multirotor.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-WING Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Matek H743-WING Flight Controller features STM32H743VI, ICM20602 & MPU6000, DPS310, OSD, 7x UARTs, 2x I2C, 1xCAN, 13x PWM outputs, 3x BEC.

flight_controllers.name: V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller (F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box)
flight_controllers.description: The V-Good RC AIO Flight Controller comes F7, OSD, 40A 6S BLHeli32 ESC, BEC, Curr, DJI, Black Box, and many other cool features all-in-1 board!

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX HD Lite F7 Flight Controller (DJI HD System Ready)
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX HD Lite F7 Flight Controller is DJI HD System Ready with an on-board 9v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug and play configuration.

flight_controllers.name: HAKRC F722 DM Mini 3-6S 20x20 HD Flight Controller for DJI
flight_controllers.description: The HAKRC F722 DM Flight Controller provides great power all in a 20x20 mounting pattern. Features MPU6000, HAKRC F722D 4.1 Betaflight, STM32F722RET6 processor, and other cool features! Compatible with DJI Digital FPV.

flight_controllers.name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 25A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 25A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

flight_controllers.name: HIFIONRC F7 2-6S 45A AIO FC + ESC Toothpick Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: This AIO board managed to fit an F7 FC along with a 45A ESC that supports up to 6S lipos!

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Forward F722 Mini 2-6S 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The HGLRC Forward F722 Mini 2-6S 20x20 Flight Controller comes with an integrated barometer and 16M black box. Features MPU6000, includes 5 UARTS, STM32F722 RET6 CPU, and can easily be connected to your DJI Digital HD FPV System.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Mini F7  Stack + F45A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC
flight_controllers.description: Get a better flying experience with the T-Motor Mini F45 + Mini F7 Stack! This stack brings lots of power all in a small package!

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor Mini F7 20x20 Flight Controller (HD+VTX+ VTX Switch)
flight_controllers.description: The new T-Motor's Mini F7 HD Flight Controller is loaded with lots of power and can be connected to the DJI Digital HD FPV System. Compare to standard versions FC, this mini FC is lighter and stronger.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Frsky
flight_controllers.description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features D8/D16 switchable, compatible with non-EU transmitter (both D8 and D16 mode) and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

flight_controllers.name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 2-4S AIO Flight Controller - Flysky
flight_controllers.description: The Crazybee F4 Pro V3.0 AIO FC is perfect for the Larva-X and Mobula6 Whoops! This FC features AFHDS and AFHDS-2A switchable, failsafe support, and no ground interference from the transmitter and the receiver.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU GN413S 13A 2-4S AIO Toothpick FC + VTX625 Stack
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU GN413S AIO Toothpick FC combined with the GOKU VTX625 VTX brings lots of cool features to your small builds!

flight_controllers.name: Zeez Design F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Zeez F7 Flight Controller is loaded with lots of great features like OSD, RGB LED, 128MB Blackbox memory, MPU6000, 3A 5V BEC, 8S Input and more!

flight_controllers.name: CubePilot The Cube Orange FD Standard Set + ADS-B
flight_controllers.description: The Cube Orange Standard Set + ADS-B  flight controller comes with an H7 processor, features a 1,090 MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix, automatically avoids aircraft and Is integrated into the new ADS-B carrier board!

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F765-WING Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The F765-Wing include the obvious F7 processor, switchable dual camera inputs, 5V/9V switcher, and a max voltage of 36V(8S).

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F722-PX w/Pixel OSD Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Matek's line of F7 flight controllers brings a host of new possibilities to your fixed wing or multirotor. Loaded with an array of features and tons of room for peripherals, this board lets you choose how you want to fly

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC STABLE F411 Stack - F411 FC + 12A BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC + 5.8GHz VTX - 16x16
flight_controllers.description: The STABLE F411 VTX Stack by GEPRC comes with a STABLE F411  Flight Controller, 12A BLheli_32 4-in-1 ESC, and 200mW 5.8GHz VTX.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F7 Stack - F7 FC + F55A PRO II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's powerful F7 Flight Controller combined with the F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance and seamless integration in your electronics stack.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (45A 2-6S Pro ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV F4 1S Brushless Flight Controller V2.2 - Frsky
flight_controllers.description: This is the lightest F4 1S brushless FC in the current market. With a slim and sleek design, 2.69g in weight and better performance on function for maximum weight savings, power, and responsiveness.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX Mini F7 20x20 Stack (30A 2-6S ESC, F7 FC, 800mW VTX)
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier F7 Mini Stack gives you premium components in a featured-packed platform, all in a 20x20 stack!

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX MINI F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX MINI F7 Flight Controller is a powerful, fully featured FC in a tiny 20x20 package.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F722 Mini Dual 20x20 Flight Controller (MPU6000 & ICM20689)
flight_controllers.description: The Flywoo GOKU F722 Mini with dual MPU6000 & ICM20689 gyros, 6 functional UARTS, BEC 5V 2A, 20x20 mounting holes and supports SBUS, iBus, Spektrum and Crossfire receiver.

flight_controllers.name: Aikon F4 Mini Flight Controller w/ OSD
flight_controllers.description: The Aikon F4 Mini 20x20 Flight Controller is a new generation flight controller that was designed to be compatible with the Aikon AK32PIN 4-in-1.

flight_controllers.name: NameLessRC AIO412T HV F4 FC + 12A 2-4S ESC
flight_controllers.description: NamelessRC's lightweight and easy to install  AIO412T HV F4 FC + 12A 2-4S ESC is perfect for your lightweight whoops and toothpick drones!

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's first F7 Flight Controller has arrived! Logical layout, designed to work seamlessly with the T-Motor F45 and F55 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F45A V2 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-In-1 ESC Combo
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controller combined with the F45A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you optimized performance - using the included 10pin cable for solderless installation and ultra-low stack height.

flight_controllers.name: Heli-Nation Talon F7 Fusion 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Fusion utilizes a dual gyro system set up in 90° phase to each other. These two ICM20602 gyros work in tandem to produce ultra-filtered data to your FC to give you the most locked-in flying experience yet!

flight_controllers.name: The Cube - Yellow (F7 Processor for Pixhawk)
flight_controllers.description: Cube Yellow target to education, drones lovers and professional cost-effective flight control hardware providers.

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F4 Stack - F4 FC, F55A Pro II 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC Combo
flight_controllers.description: T-Motor's well-designed F4 Flight Controler combined with the F55A PRO II 55A 3-6s BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC will give you an experience!

flight_controllers.name: T-Motor F4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The T-Motor F4 Flight Controller comes with an LC filter, which is great for eliminating interference to your VTX or other equipment. Loaded with 6 UARTs and is specially optimized to fit the F55A PRO II.

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone BeeBrain Lite DSM - Project Mockingbird Edition
flight_controllers.description: dummy

flight_controllers.name: SP Racing H7 400Mhz EXTREME Dual Gyro Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SP Racing H7 EXTREME flight controller features a 400Mhz H7 CPU that runs twice as fast as the previous generation F7 boards.

flight_controllers.name: SP Racing H7 400Mhz NANO-S Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SPRacing H7 NANO is a nano-sized Flight Controller (FC) with integrated 2-6S BEC for the ultimate power in your next nano-sized or ultra-lightweight race quad build.

flight_controllers.name: FuriousFPV RacePit F4 Flight Controller 5V BEC, Black Box, OSD
flight_controllers.description: Capable of running 2-6S input voltage, 6 Uarts, and a built-in inverter for S.BUS and S.PORT means you'll be able to adapt the RacePIT FC to almost any build.

flight_controllers.name: XILO Stax F4 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The XILO Stax F4 Flight Controller combines powerful F4 processing power with a host of features such as receiver mounting and VTX remote power switching. Plug n' play allows stacking with your favorite 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: Whitenoise Synergy F4 AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SynergyF4 was designed as an upgrade to your standard F4 flight controller with a focus on cleaner and easier building, especially using Unify V3 and Nano VTXs and XM+ and Crossfire Nano receivers.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F722-SE AIO Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Matek's line of F7 flight controllers brings a host of new possibilities to your fixed wing or multirotor. Loaded with an array of features and tons of room for peripherals, this board lets you choose how you want to fly.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F722-WING Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: New features in the F722-Wing include the obvious F7 processor, switchable dual camera inputs, 5V/9V switcher, and a max voltage of 36V(8S).

flight_controllers.name: NewBeeDrone BeeBrain Lite AIO Brushed FC & Camera (FrSky)
flight_controllers.description: The BeeBrain Lite is an AIO brushed flight controller with built-in 1-25mw VTX, OSD, F4 CPU, and a first for brushed FC's, active braking! All on one board!

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier LUX F7 Ultimate Flight Controller (Dual Gyros)
flight_controllers.description: The Lumenier LUX F7 flight controller is full of features including dual gyros, barometer, OSD, 5x UART, SD Card slot, easy soldering layout and much more.

flight_controllers.name: Heli-Nation Talon F7 V2 20x20 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Everything you loved about Talon F7 BB with a VTX Pit switch and the proven MPU6000 Gyro!

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F405-STD Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Matek F405-STD is generously equipped with an STM32F405, ICM20602 (32K), BMP280, BFOSD, SD Card Slot, VCP+5x UARTs, 6x PWM / DShot outputs. BF and iNav compatible.

flight_controllers.name: Sp Racing Stacking Vtx Board Without Vtx Module
flight_controllers.description: Stackable VTX board to enable direct solder of TBS Unify, RTC6705, or XM+ diversity receiver with your SP Racing F7 Dual FC or SP Racing H7 EXTREME.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 4 Neo-M8N GPS
flight_controllers.description: Holybro now offers a new GPS which works with the Pixhawk 4. It has a UBLOX M8N module on it, as well as an IST8310 compass and tri-colored LED indicator, along with the Safety switch making the connection more convenient and simple.

flight_controllers.name: EMAX F3 Babyhawk Femto Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The EMAX F3 Femto FC with pre-soldered wires and pin header for the Babyhawk.

flight_controllers.name: CL Racing F4 Mini Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: A micro capable FC with full-size features such as OSD, 5v/9v BEC, and more!

flight_controllers.name: DALRC F405 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: DALRC F405 Flight Controller comes equipped with a STM32F405 high-quality MCU, MPU6000 gyro, built-in OSD, and 9V/3A BEC.

flight_controllers.name: OverSky Scisky Micro F3 Brushed Flight Control built-in RX option, FrSky
flight_controllers.description: The Scisky F3 brushed flight control board based on F3 EVO hardware, supports CleanFlight and BetaFlight firmware.

flight_controllers.name: Flywoo GOKU F4 V2 AIO - F405 FC (ICM42688) + 12A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + ELRS - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: With the rise of digital transmission, FLYWOO presents an innovative solution for 1-2S HD Micro Drones. The GOKU F405 HD V2 AIO integrates a Type-C interface, a high-performance F405 BGA MCU, and multiple UARTs.

flight_controllers.name: Skystars H743 HD Flight Controller - 30x30 - Dual Gyro
flight_controllers.description: The Skystars H743 HD Dual Gyro Flight Controller is a future-proof FC with X8 support, OSD, dual BMI270 gyro, BMP280 barometer, 16M Blackbox, 8 UARTS, and more! The Dual gyro sensors provide a super accurate response for improved flight and feel.

flight_controllers.name: Skystars H743 HD Flight Controller - 30x30 - Single Gyro
flight_controllers.description: The Skystars H743 HD Single Gyro Flight Controller is a future-proof FC with X8 support, OSD, BMI270 gyro, BMP280 barometer, 16M Blackbox, 8 UARTS, and more!

flight_controllers.name: BETAFPV Matrix HD AIO - G4 FC + 12A 1S 3-in-1 ESC + ELRS RX - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The BETAFPV Matrix 1S 3-IN-1 HD AIO is designed specifically for 1S HD whoops, featuring the signature "cross" design for optimal performance.

flight_controllers.name: GEPRC TAKER G4 AIO - G4 FC + 45A 2-6S ESC - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: The TAKER G4 45A AIO, developed by the GEPRC team, features the G473 main control for enhanced computing power. It offers powerful overcurrent capability and diversified electrical setup options.

flight_controllers.name: Lumenier tinyFISH Power Stack F3 16x16mm Flight Controller + 4A 4-in-1 ESC + FrSky Rx
flight_controllers.description: The incredibly small and powerful Lumenier tinyFISH Power Stack F3 16x16mm Flight Controller + 4A 4-in-1 ESC + FrSky Rx .

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F7 V3 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SpeedyBee F7 V3 Flight Controller is an F722 FC featuring a BMP280 barometer, OSD, 500MB Memory Blackbox, a built-in FC LiPo monitoring system, and many more features.

flight_controllers.name: BrainFPV Radix 2 H7 Flight Controller - Analog
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the BrainFPV RADIX 2 H7 Flight Controller, a cutting-edge innovation in drone technology crafted to redefine your FPV experience.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-WING V3 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The MATEKSYS H743-WING V3 Flight Controller is a powerful, versatile choice for fixed-wing, VTOL, and hybrid drones.

flight_controllers.name: FORTINI F4 OSD 32Khz Flight Controller Rev. 2
flight_controllers.description: Building upon the powerful Fortini F4, Furious FPV introduces the all-new Fortini F4 OSD, introducing new capability & functionality to simplify setup & redefine your next FPV experience.

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 WING MINI Flight Controller - 25x25
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the SpeedyBee F405 WING MINI Flight Controller, your ultimate companion for smooth and stable flights.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F405 Wing V2 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the MATEKSYS F405 Wing V2 Flight Controller, the ultimate choice for precision flight control in fixed-wing aircraft.

flight_controllers.name: Pixhawk 2.1 Cube Black
flight_controllers.description: The Pixhawk 2.1 Cube by Hex.

flight_controllers.name: Diatone Mamba F722 APP Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Diatone's Mamba series gives racers an edge in competition. The latest F7 processing technology means you can focus on flying, not on the limits of your equipment.

flight_controllers.name: JHEMCU GHF13AIO F4 13A 2-4S BL_S 4-in-1 Brushless Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The GHF13AIO F4 13A is a new ultra-light (4.3g), brushless flight controller by JHEMCU!

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-SLIM V3 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The MATEKSYS H743-SLIM V3 Flight Controller arrives with new features and improvements over the original! This FC is equipped with STM32H743VI, ICM20602 & MPU6000, DPS310, OSD, 7x UARTs, 2x I2C, 1xCAN, 13x PWM outputs, BEC5V, and much more!

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 WING APP Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The SpeedyBee F405 WING APP Flight Controller features an upgraded sensor for enhanced precision and navigation.

flight_controllers.name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C FC Module w/ Plastic Case
flight_controllers.description: The Pixhawk® 6C is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk® flight controllers, based on the Pixhawk® FMUv6C Open Standard and Connector Standard.

flight_controllers.name: HGLRC Specter F722 Pro Flight Controller - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the HGLRC Specter F722 Pro Flight Controller, which optimizes the ZEUS series layout and enhances the circuit design for improved performance.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H7A3-SLIM Flight Controller - ICM42688P - 30x30
flight_controllers.description: The MATEKSYS H7A3-SLIM Flight Controller offers high performance in a compact 30x30mm design. It features the STM32H7A3RIT6 MCU, 280MHz Cortex-M7 processor, 1.4MB RAM, and 2MB Flash.

flight_controllers.name: Flycolor X-Tower F4 FC + 40A BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
flight_controllers.description: The Flycolor F4 40A Stack gives you all the essentials you need to get in the air and fly with the best components.

flight_controllers.name: FETtec KISS F7 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: Features an F7 processor, onboard spaces for both VTX and RX, Pit-mode built-in for Unify Nano, and solder-free connection to FETtec 4-in-1 ESC.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS F405-MiniTE Flight Controller - Mini 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The F405 MiniTE Flight Controller was designed to be smaller and lighter than its bigger brother, and the 20x20mm mount allows for more space to work with on your build.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-MINI V3 Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The Matek H743-Mini V3 FC is a powerful flight controller using the HSTM32H743VIT6 MCU running at 480MHz.

flight_controllers.name: MATEKSYS H743-WLITE Flight Controller
flight_controllers.description: The MATEKSYS H743-WLITE Flight Controller is equipped with STM32H743VIH6, ICM42688-P, DPS310, OSD, 7 UARTs, 1 CAN, 2x I2C, 12x PWM outputs, and 3x BEC and other cool features that make this FC a winner in the wing game!

flight_controllers.name: SpeedyBee F405 Mini Stack - F405 V3 FC + 35A 3-6S BLHeli_S 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
SpeedyBee F405 Mini Flight Controller - 20x20
flight_controllers.description: The SpeedyBee F405 Mini 20x20 Flight Controller is a testament to innovative drone technology, leveraging the advanced capabilities of the F405 chip, which outperforms its F411 counterpart.

flight_controllers.name: BrainFPV Radix 2 H7 Flight Controller - HD
flight_controllers.description: Introducing the BrainFPV RADIX 2 HD H7 Flight Controller, a pinnacle of drone technology engineered for unparalleled performance and reliability.

flight_controllers.name: DYS F7 Stack - F722 FC + 65A 2-8S AM32 4-in-1 ESC - ICM42688P - 30x30

It supports 4:3 or 16:9 aspect ratios, PAL/NTSC systems, and includes wide dynamic range, 3D noise reduction, and on-screen flight OSD.

fpv_cameras.name: Caddx Farsight Analog FPV Camera

fpv_cameras.name: BETAFPV P1 Air Unit HD VTX

fpv_cameras.name: HDZero Whoop V2 Bundle (Nano V3 Camera)

fpv_cameras.name: Foxeer Mini Cat 4 - 1200TVL StarLight FPV Camera

fpv_cameras.name: Caddx Gazer Analog FPV Camera

fpv_cameras.name: RunCam Phoenix 2 FPV Camera - Special Edition V2
fpv_cameras.description: The RunCam Phoenix 2 FPV Camera - Special Edition V2 features a Day & Night Freestyle FPV Camera with a fully covered back cover design that is dustproof and short-circuit proof.

fpv_cameras.name: HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX Kit

fpv_cameras.name: RunCam Split 4 V2 FPV Camera
fpv_cameras.description: Capture stunning aerial footage with the RunCam Split 4 V2, a high-performance FPV camera for drone enthusiasts.

fpv_cameras.name: Walksnail Avatar GT KIT

fpv_cameras.name: DarwinFPV HULK Waterproof Camera

fpv_cameras.name: DarwinFPV Cement FPV Camera

fpv_cameras.name: Foxeer Micro Toothless 2 - 1200TVL 1/2" Sensor Switchable FOV StarLight FPV Camera - 1.7mm

fpv_cameras.name: HDZero ECO FPV System

frames.name: HGLRC MY5 5" Frame Kit
frames.description: The HGLRC MY5 Frame Kit is a lightweight, durable 5‑inch frame designed for freestyle builds. Its rigid construction and optimized layout make installation easy while supporting a wide range of components.

frames.name: DeepSpace Seeker 5 DC Frame Kit
frames.description: The DeepSpace Seeker 5 DC Frame Kit is ready for cinematic greatness.

frames.name: TBS Source One V6 5" Frame Kit
frames.description: The TBS Source One V6 5" Frame Kit is a wide-stance X configuration frame, popular for freestyle or free-range acrobatic flying.

frames.name: Axisflying Manta 5 Se Dc Replacement Arm Front
frames.description: The Axisflying Manta 5" SE DC Replacement Arm - Front is a durable and precision-engineered replacement part for your Axisflying Manta 5" SE DC.

frames.name: Axisflying Manta 5 Se Dc Replacement Arm Rear
frames.description: The Axisflying Manta 5" SE DC Replacement Arm - Rear is a durable and precision-engineered replacement part for your Axisflying Manta 5" SE DC.

frames.name: Beginner DIY FPV Drone Bundle - QAV-S 2 Bardwell SE 5” + Fat Shark Dominator HD Goggles + Walksnail Avatar HD Pro
frames.description: This Bundle features the  Beginner DIY Drone Kit - QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE 5” (HD Ready), Fat Shark Dominator Digital HD FPV Goggles, and the Walksnail Avatar HD Pro Kit - 32GB w/ Dual Antennas at a special price!

frames.name: FlyFishRC Volador Ⅱ VX5 O4 Pro Freestyle Frame Kit - Black
frames.description: The FlyFishRC Volador II VX5 O4 Pro Freestyle Frame Kit is a refined 5” Squashed X frame built for top-tier performance and ultra-clean builds.

frames.name: AxisFlying Manta 5 Pro O4 Pro Frame Kit - Squashed X
frames.description: Built on continuous user feedback and refined design, the AxisFlying Manta 5 Pro is the next evolution in freestyle frames. Featuring a squashed X layout for improved stability and control, this frame combines precision CNC aluminum components with high-quality carbon fiber plates for maximum strength and style.

frames.name: SpeedyBee Mario 5 Frame Kit - XH O4 Pro
frames.description: Experience agile freestyle and smooth cinematic flight with the SpeedyBee Mario 5 XH Frame Kit.

frames.name: Lumenier Qav S 2 Johnnyfpv Se 5 Bundle
frames.description: Introducing the Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV Special Edition 5" Bundle, a cutting-edge masterpiece designed to elevate your FPV drone experience.

frames.name: FlyFishRC Volador Ⅱ VD5 O4 Pro Deadcat Frame Kit - Black
frames.description: The FlyFishRC Volador II VD5 O4 Pro Frame Kit is a refined 5-inch Deadcat frame designed for ultra-clean HD footage with no props in view. Based on pilot feedback, it’s been upgraded for easier builds, better durability, and a sleeker look.

frames.name: FlyFishRC Fifty5 O4 Pro Freestyle Frame Kit - Black
frames.description: Introducing the FlyFishRC Fifty5 O4 Pro Freestyle Frame Kit. Built specifically for the DJI O4 Pro system, It strikes the perfect balance between the agility of a 5-inch and the power of a 6-inch, making it ideal for both smooth cinematic flying and aggressive freestyle.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE 5” Frame Kit
frames.description: Introducing the Lumenier QAV-S 2 5" Freestyle Quadcopter Frame - Joshua Bardwell Special Edition, a custom-designed drone frame for FPV Freestyle flying! It is feature packed and Bardwell's favorite frame!

frames.name: iFlight Mach R5 Sport Canopy + Sharkfin Kit
frames.description: Give your drone a fresh look and improved aerodynamics with the iFlight Mach R5 Sport Canopy and Sharkfin Kit.

frames.name: AOS RC HS5 High-Speed Drone Frame Kit
frames.description: The AOS HS5 is engineered for unmatched speed and precision, reaching top speeds of over 200 mph (320 kph) while capturing every moment with stunning clarity.

frames.name: Beginner DIY FPV Drone Kit - QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE 5” - Analog
frames.description: The Beginner DIY Drone Kit - QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE 5” - Analog is the ultimate bundle that comes with all of the components necessary to build a beginner FPV drone.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-PRO Whoop 5" Cinequads Edition - Frame Kit
frames.description: This Frame Kit is the Lumenier QAV-PRO WHOOP Cinequads Edition, which is a versatile 5-inch prop-guarded FPV drone kit that is designed to be durable and agile while offering full propeller protection and the ability to carry professional cinema cameras.

frames.name: HGLRC Wind5 Lite V2 Racing Frame Kit
frames.description: The HGLRC Wind5 Lite V2 is a lightweight racing frame optimized for drone competitions. Its 195mm positive-X design enhances flight performance, while the Toray-T700 carbon fiber and 7075 aluminum columns ensure durability.

frames.name: HGLRC Y6 5" LR Frame Kit
frames.description: The HGLRC Y6 5" LR Frame Kit offers a 50% increase in the propeller area for carrying full-sized action cameras while maintaining a compact design.

frames.name: Axisflying Manta 5 Pro Frame Kit - Squashed X
frames.description: The Axisflying Manta 5 Pro Frame Kit is a sleek, lightweight, squashed X frame designed for FPV pilots seeking stability and clear footage.

frames.name: Axisflying Manta 5 Pro Frame Kit - Deadcat
frames.description: The Axisflying Manta 5 Pro Frame Kit is a sleek, lightweight deadcat-style frame designed for FPV pilots seeking stability and clear footage.

frames.name: AOS RC 5R Race Frame Kit
frames.description: Redefining the state of the art in FPV drone racing, the AOS 5R Race Frame Kit is designed with cutting-edge, patent-pending technology to give you an edge over the competition.

frames.name: iFlight Mach R5 Sport Frame Kit
frames.description: The iFlight Mach R5 Sport Frame Kit aims to provide racing pilots with a high-quality finished FPV frame that allows for DIY customization.

frames.name: Lumenier Qav Pro Whoop 5 Cinequads Edition Dji O3 Upgrade Kit
frames.description: The Lumenier DJI O3 Upgrade Kit allows you to mount a DJI O3 / HD Camera with a 20mm mounting pattern to the QAV-PRO Whoop 5" frame.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - X-Lock Kit
frames.description: The Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE introduces a new lateral X-Lock arm system.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Camera Plates
frames.description: The new Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE FPV camera mounting solution offers excellent camera protection and support for various cameras through customizable carbon plates.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Rear Mounting Plates
frames.description: The Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE rear mounting plates provide a personalized solution for a hard-mounted XT60 connection and a range of accessories.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Front Split Plate
frames.description: This Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE Rear Front Plate improves the QAV-S design with added rigidity and stability.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Rear Tilt Kit
frames.description: The Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE Rear Tilt System improves the rear mount design with adjustable components.

frames.name: Lumenier Qav S 2 Johnnyfpv Se 5 Arm
frames.description: Introducing the Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE 5" Arm.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Top Plate + Battery Pad
frames.description: The Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE introduces a durable top plate!

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE - Rear Split Plate
frames.description: This Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE Rear Split Plate improves the QAV-S design with added rigidity and stability.

frames.name: AOS RC EVO V1.2 Frame Kit
frames.description: When using heavier action cameras such as the GoPro Hero 9/10/11, opting for an AOS RC EVO V1.2 Frame Kit provides significant benefits in thrust and efficiency.

frames.name: AOS RC V5 O4 Frame Kit - AOS 5"
frames.description: The AOS RC V5 O4 Frame Kit is a compact and durable 5" freestyle drone frame designed for smooth flying and crystal-clear video.

frames.name: T Motor Yema 5 Frame True X Bottom Plate
frames.description: A replacement bottom plate for the T-Motor Yema 5" frame.

frames.name: T Motor Yema 5 Frame Main Plate

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 JohnnyFPV SE 5” Frame Kit

frames.name: Quadifier Diamondback Pro 5" Frame Kit - Type F O3
frames.description: The Quadifier Diamondback Pro Type F is not your ordinary 5-inch freestyle frame. it's a precision-engineered masterpiece designed to look fierce and perform with unmatched prowess in the air.

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE Aluminum Camera Plate (Set of 2)

frames.name: Lumenier QAV-S 2 Joshua Bardwell SE Split Front Plate

frames.name: iFlight Nazgul Evoque V2 Frame Kit - F5D/F5X/F6D/F6X
frames.description: The old days are over, getting your electronics full of dirt and wet grass every time you crash. Our latest frame reduces contamination that could build up on your flight controller or ESCs, preventing failure or short circuits. Strategic airflow to keep your components cool and clean without taking any shortcuts in weight or performance. Illuminated side panels and 360-degree TPU protective parts.

frames.name: GEPRC Mark5 GEP-MK5 5" Freestyle Frame Kit - Black Pro Version
frames.description: The GEPRC MARK5 Pro Frame Kit is developed specifically for freestyle with squashed X arm design.

frames.description: The HGLRC Sector X5 FR is a 5" Freestyle FPV Frame with Wide X configuration. Take your freestyle flights to the next level with this durable frame! This frame features quick swap arms for easy electronic fixes and CNC aluminum side plates.

frames.name: Foxeer Aura Lightweight LR Freestyle Frame Kit

gps_modules.name: Holybro Micro M10 GPS w/ Case
gps_modules.description: This Holybro Micro M10 GPS unit utilizes multi-constellation GNSS powered by u-blox M10, a concurrent GNSS receiver capable of receiving and tracking multiple GNSS systems.

gps_modules.name: Lumenier SAM-M10Q GPS Module - NDAA

gps_modules.name: Holybro M9N Standard GPS w/ 10-Pin Cable

gps_modules.name: HGLRC M100 Mini GPS
gps_modules.description: Using the new 10th-generation UBLOX chip design, the HGLRC M100 GPS positioning is fast and accurate. The small 15x15mm size can be loaded on 2-7 inch drones. The ceramic antenna and externally expanded PCB design allow M100 MINI GPS to receive satellite signals effectively.

gps_modules.name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Mini V3 GPS Module

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 7050 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Gemfan Street League Hurricane 7043 Propeller Set Of 4
propellers.description: The Gemfan Street League Hurricane 7043 Propeller has an M5 mounting diameter, 7" length, and 4.3" pitch, weighing only 10g each. These propellers will outlast other performance props!

propellers.name: HQProp R37 5.1x3.7x3 Racing Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: HQProp R36 5.1x3.6x3 Racing Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane SL 5125 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4) - 1.5mm Shaft

propellers.name: HQProp Ethix P3.3 Polycarbonate 5.1" Propellers (Set of 4) - Mango Lassi
propellers.description: The HQProp Ethix P3.3 is a 5.1" 3-Blade polycarbonate propeller with a 3.3" pitch.

propellers.name: Gemfan 40mm 1608 3-Blade Polycarbonate Propeller (Set of 8) - 1.5mm

propellers.name: Gemfan 45mm 3-Blade Polycarbonate Propeller (Set of 8) - 1mm/1.5mm
propellers.description: The Gemfan 45mm 3-Blade Propeller comes with either a 1mm or 1.5mm mounting diameter, 45mm length, 1.5" pitch, and only weighs .43g each. They perform particularly well on Cinewhoops!

propellers.name: Gemfan 45mm 2-Blade Polycarbonate Propeller (Set of 8) - 1mm/1.5mm

propellers.name: HQProp D4x5x3 Polycarbonate 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 51466 V2 3-Blade Propeller - MCK Edition (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Get ready to race with Gemfan's Hurricane 51466 Durable 3-Blade MCK Edition 5.1" Propeller! The V2 provides a much better grip and smoother flight characteristics. Ideal for freestyling and racing!

propellers.name: Gemfan 2925 5-Blade Propeller for DJI Avata (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Dalprop Cyclone M3 T5126 Propeller Set Of 4
propellers.description: The Cyclone T5126 is the perfect pair for M3 motors such as the new Lumenier ZIP V2 M3 Cinematic Motor.

propellers.name: HQProp Juicy J37 4.9x3.7x3 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The HQProp Juicy J37 4.9x3.7x3 Propeller is the perfect balanced prop for a juicy experience! The HQProp J37 props have a diameter of 4.9", 3.7" pitch, 5mm shaft hole, and only weighs 3.4g!

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 6038 4-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Gain more power, control, and speed with Gemfan Hurricane 6038 4-Blade Propellers!

propellers.name: HQProp Durable T3X2X3 Polycarbonate Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The HQProp Durable 3x2x3 Polycarbonate Propeller is a 3-Blade 3" propeller with a 2" pitch.

propellers.name: HQProp DT2.9X2.5X4 Polycarbonate Propeller for DJI Avata (Set of 4) - Gray
propellers.description: The HQProp DT2.9X2.5X4 Polycarbonate Propeller is a 4-Blade 2.9" propeller with a 2.5" pitch. This prop can fit many drones and is fully compatible with the DJI Avata.

propellers.name: Gemfan 6032 3-Blade Freestyle Propeller - Ellis Van Jason (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The Gemfan 6032 3-Blade Freestyle Propeller - Ellis Van Jason edition is the perfect propeller for the BOB57 LR 6" Drone. This 6-inch propeller has a pitch of 3.2",  5mm shaft hole and weighs 5.8g! Suitable for 2407 / 2506 motors.

propellers.name: HQProp DT2.9X2.5X5 Polycarbonate Propeller for DJI Avata (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 4937 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The Gemfan Hurricane 4937 3-Blade Propeller prop is great for precision and control needed for small and medium race tracks or bandos.

propellers.name: Ethix P3.5 Polycarbonate 5.1" Propeller (Set of 4) - RAD Berry

propellers.name: DALProp Nepal N2 T5142.5 Freestyle Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The DALProp Nepal N2 Propeller was inspired by the Nepal knife "Kukri," as well as the widely used sweep-back wing of planes and the spiral wing of vessels. This propeller comes in a cool shape, is smooth, powerful, and designed for freestyle and cinematic drones.

propellers.name: Gemfan Vanover 5136 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Gain more power, control, and speed with Gemfan Vanover 5136 3-Blade Propellers. Made in collaboration with the acclaimed FPV Pilot Captain Vanover!

propellers.name: Gemfan SBANG 4934 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Gain more power, control, and speed with Gemfan SBANG 4934 3-Blade Propellers!

propellers.name: HQProp Duct-T90MMX3 Polycarbonate Cinewhoop Propeller (Set of 4) - Gray

propellers.name: HQProp MacroQuad 9X4X3R Glass Fiber Reinforced Nylon Propeller (CW)
propellers.description: The HQProp MacroQuad 9X4X3R Glass Fiber Reinforced Nylon Propeller (CW) i s part of HQProp's MacroQuad propeller series which was made for large drones that need agile and powerful flight characteristics.

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 5536 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Gain more power, control, and speed with Gemfan Hurricane 5536 3-Blade Propellers!

propellers.name: T-Motor PACER Series P49436 Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 4525 Durable 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)

propellers.name: DAL Fold 2 F7 Folding Freestyle Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The DAL Fold 2 F7 is a 7" propeller that is smooth, efficient, and comes in a folding design. The folding design is more durable, safe, and easier to transport!

propellers.name: HQProp T6X2.5X3 3-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: A set of four T6x2.5x3 3-blade propellers by HQProp. These props are made of polycarbonate and have three blades, a 1.5mm shaft, and a pitch of 2.5mm.

propellers.name: HQProp Duct-76MMX8 Cinewhoop 8-Blade Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The ducted 8-blade propeller by HQProp is suitable for your 3" CineWhoop!

propellers.name: HQProp Duct 75MMX6 Propeller ( Set of 4)
propellers.description: The HQProp Duct 75MMX6 Propeller comes in a set of 4 with a 6-blade style and 5mm shaft diameter. Great props for ducted CineWhoops!

propellers.name: iFlight Nazgul T3020 Propellers (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The Nazgul T3020 is a T-mount 3" propeller specialized for ultralight builds such as toothpicks.

propellers.name: HQProp T3x1.5 Toothpick Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: Gain more power, control, and speed with HQProp Durable T3x1.5 Toothpick Propellers!

propellers.name: HQProp Ummagawd 4Play Freestyle Gulf Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The signature prop of Tommy "Ummagawd" Tibajia, these are designed for "SUPER GRIP" and come in a "Gulf" color scheme reminiscent of a certain Ford GT40 livery.

propellers.name: DAL Nepal N1 5.1x4.35x3 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The DAL Nepal N1 Propeller was inspired by the Nepal knife "Kukri," as well as the widely used sweep-back wing of planes and the spiral wing of vessels.

propellers.name: DALProp SpitFire T5147.5 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: According to DAL, these are the ultimate race props that eliminate prop wash, while providing a lot of control.>

propellers.name: Emax AVAN Long Range 6X3.8X2 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: he Emax Avan Long Range propeller 6x3.8x2 was designed to maximize the range of flight.

propellers.name: T-Motor T3140 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: T-Motor's T3140 tri-blade propeller is a durable small-sized prop with a 5mm center hub. The T3140 features high efficiency, fast response and excellent balance!

propellers.name: T-Motor T6143 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: T-Motor's T6143 racing propeller hits the sweet spot between high and low pitch propellers. Finding the spot between power and efficiency, the T6143 will give you precise control on the racetrack.

propellers.name: T-Motor T5143S Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: T-Motor's T5143S Propellers are extremely smooth, durable, and POPO compatible!

propellers.name: HQProp MacroQuad 9x5x3 Propeller (CCW - Single)
propellers.description: HQProp's MacroQuad propeller series was made for large drones that need agile and powerful flight characteristics.

propellers.name: Gemfan Flash 5144 Propeller (Set of 4 - Choose Color)
propellers.description: The Gemfan Flash 5144 propeller has been specifically designed for high-speed racing.

propellers.name: Azure Power 5148 SFP (Strong Fast Props)
propellers.description: Durable, efficient, and made for the race track - the Azure Power 5148 SFP (Strong Fast Prop) series is a must-have for FPV racing!

propellers.name: Gemfan Hurricane 51466 Propeller (Set of 4 - Choose Color)
propellers.description: The 51466 Hurricane series was designed for agile flight at high speed with its incredibly low weight at just over 4g.

propellers.name: Azure Power Johnny Freestyle 4838 Propeller (Set of 4)
propellers.description: The Johnny Freestyle Propeller is a first for Azure Power in a few different ways. It is their first collaboration with an FPV Pilot, Johnny Schaer (AKA Johnny FPV) and it is also the first prop from Azure that is POPO compatible!

propellers.name: Azure Power 6145 BSP - Big Smooth Props (Set of 4 - Red)
propellers.description: BSP stands for Big Smooth Props, and they are just that. Try them for yourself and feel the smoothness!

propellers.name: Azure Power 6145 BSP - Big Smooth Props (Set of 4 - Teal)
propellers.description: BSP stands for Big Smooth Props, and they are just that. Try them for yourself and feel the smoothness!

propellers.name: Azure Power 6145 BSP - Big Smooth Props (Set of 4 - Greenery)
propellers.description: BSP stands for Big Smooth Props, and they are just that. Try them for yourself and feel the smoothness!

propellers.name: HQProp Ethix S3 Watermelon Propellers
propellers.description: Straight from the metal man himself, Mr. Steele, comes the Ethix S3 Watermelon propeller. Comes in watermelon themed colors and a low profile hub.

propellers.name: HQProp DP 5.1X3.1X3 Propeller (Set of 4 - Light Blue)
propellers.description: HQProp's 5.1 x 3.1 propeller features POPO compatibility as well as a very low pitch airfoil, giving this prop mellow and smooth characteristics in flight, while also not killing your batteries.

propellers.name: HQProp DP 5.5X3.5X3 PC Propeller (Set of 4 - Light Green)
propellers.description: HQProp latest long-range focused propeller features POPO compatibility as well as a low pitch airfoil, giving this prop mellow characteristics in flight, while also not killing your batteries.

propellers.name: Gemfan Flash 6042 Durable 3 Blade Propeller (Set of 4 - Clear)
propellers.description: The Gemfan Flash 6042 3-Blade Design reduces downwash of blade tip vortex and induced drag to match the specific torque curves of a GT2206 and above brushless motor. The light blade propeller has smooth turning performance and fast response.

propellers.name: Gemfan Flash 5149 Propeller (Set of 4 - Clear)
propellers.description: Gemfan joins the POPO crew with their latest high-speed prop, the 5149. This propeller has tons of thrust, even in the low end.

propellers.name: Gemfan Flash 5149 Propeller (Set of 4 - Clear Green)
propellers.description: Gemfan joins the POPO crew with their latest high-speed prop, the 5149. This propeller has tons of thrust, even in the low end.

propellers.name: HQProp DP 3X5X3 PC Propeller (Set of 4 - Light Blue)
propellers.description: The HQProp DP 3X5X3V1S Propeller. The new airfoil design from HQProp. Comes in a set of four propellers.

propellers.name: Gemfan Flash 7042 Durable 2 Blade (Ferrari Red) - Set of 4
propellers.description: Gemfan Flash Propellers have been specifically designed for high-speed racing. The inverse tip design helps to reduce blade tip vortex and the light weight of the propeller means it has a smaller moment of inertia and fast response time.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 160mm Antenna
receivers.description: With the extreme range and high packet rate of the iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver and 160mm Antenna, failsafes are a thing of the past.

receivers.name: FrSky X8R 16ch Receiver, SBUS, Smart Port - Amplified PCB Antenna
receivers.description: The new FrSky X8R 16ch Receiver with SBUS, Smart Port - Telemetry - Amplified PCB Antenna

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver + 220mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS 500mW 900M Receiver + 160mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS 500mW 900MHz Receiver houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

receivers.name: HappyModel ES900 900MHz ELRS Dual RX Diversity Receiver
receivers.description: The HappyModel ES900 900MHz ELRS Dual RX Diversity Receiver has 915MHz / 868MHz and built-in TCXO. Ideal for RC Airplanes and FPV Long Range Drones.

receivers.name: ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid DUO V2 2.4GHz Rx & 25-600mW 5.8GHz VTX
receivers.description: The new ImmersionRC Tramp/Ghost Hybrid DUO V2 is a high-end analog 5.8GHz 25mW - 600mW video transmitter and 2.4GHz diversity receiver!

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 220mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband 500mW Receiver + 220mm Antenna houses high-power telemetry inside a sleek, single-side component design.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS Dualband Diversity 100mW Receiver - 2x70mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband Diversity 100mW Receiver - 2x70mm Antenna supports 2.4GHz, 868MHz, and 900MHz frequencies for exceptional stability and reliability.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x160mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x160mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x220mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x220mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x70mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS True Diversity 2.4GHz Receiver + 2x70mm Antenna is a true dual-antenna diversity receiver with exceptional frequency stability.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS Dualband 100mW Receiver - 160mm Antenna
receivers.description: The iFlight ELRS Dualband 100mW Receiver - 160mm Antenna supports 2.4GHz, 868MHz, and 900MHz frequencies for exceptional stability and reliability.

receivers.name: iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 70mm Antenna
receivers.description: It's finally here, the iFlight ELRS Nano 2.4GHz Receiver + 70mm Antenna with extreme range and packet rate for lowest delay.

receivers.name: BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antenna - Mono ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz
receivers.description: The BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antenna - Mono ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz is powered by Semtech’s LR1121 RF and Espressif’s ESP32-C3 chips.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano RX
receivers.description: A full-capability TBS Crossfire Diversity receiver in nano form factor. Ideal for long range miniquads or smaller wings.

receivers.name: BETAFPV SuperX Gemini Xross Receiver w/ T-Antennas - Nano ELRS 2.4GHz/915Mhz
receivers.description: The BETAFPV SuperX Nano ELRS Dual-Band Diversity Receiver is a true diversity solution designed for maximum reliability in long-range FPV, freestyle, and aerial applications. Equipped with dual receiver chains, TCXO technology for extreme temperature stability, and dual antennas for stronger signal coverage, it ensures consistent performance in demanding environments.

receivers.name: RadioMaster XR1 Nano Multi-Frequency Receiver - ELRS 2.4GHz
receivers.description: The XR1 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 13mm. Powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver, it operates on 2.4GHz, offering excellent range and sensitivity in a lightweight design.

receivers.name: RadioMaster ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver w/Antennas - RP4TD
receivers.description: The ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - RP4TD, with dual-channel 2.4GHz radios, leads in signal sensitivity and performance with its optimized circuit design.

receivers.name: RadioMaster XR3 Nano Multi-Frequency Diversity Receiver - ELRS 2.4GHz
receivers.description: The XR3 Receiver is a compact ExpressLRS receiver, measuring 20 x 15mm and powered by the third-generation Semtech LR1121 transceiver. It operates on 2.4GHz, offering exceptional range and sensitivity in a lightweight design, which is ideal for any build.

receivers.name: GEPRC Dual Antenna Diversity Receiver - ELRS 915MHz
receivers.description: The GEPRC ELRS DUAL 915M Diversity Receiver is a next-gen, dual-antenna receiver based on the ExpressLRS open-source project, delivering long-range operation, low latency, and up to 200 Hz refresh rate.

receivers.name: HGLRC Gemini ELRS 2.4GHz RX Dual Receiver
receivers.description: Introducing the HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz GEMINI Receiver, a cutting-edge receiver with dual communication links and true diversity dual reception for exceptional anti-interference performance.

receivers.name: HGLRC Gemini ELRS 915MHz RX Dual Receiver
receivers.description: Introducing the HGLRC Gemini RX Dual Receiver, a cutting-edge receiver with dual communication links and true diversity dual reception for exceptional anti-interference performance.

receivers.name: Foxeer ELRS Diversity Receiver - 915MHz
receivers.description: Introducing the advanced Foxeer 915MHz RX Module, designed to deliver exceptional performance and reliability for your FPV drone needs.

receivers.name: DarwinFPV Cement Ultra Durable ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
receivers.description: Introducing the DarwinFPV Cement Ultra Durable ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver, engineered to withstand extreme environments.

receivers.name: BETAFPV ELRS Lite V1.1 2.4GHz Receiver w/ Flat Antenna
receivers.description: The BETAFPV Lite 2.4GHz receiver is based on the ExpressLRS project, an open-source RC link for RC applications.

receivers.name: BETAFPV SuperD ELRS 2.4GHz Diversity Receiver
receivers.description: The BETAFPV SuperD ELRS Receiver is the first True Diversity Receiver that applies two antennas, dual receiver chains, and TCXO (temperature-compensated crystal oscillator) technology, achieving a super accurate frequency rate and excellent performance in extreme temperature environments.

receivers.name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz True Diversity Receiver - ELRS R24-TD
receivers.description: Introducing the MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz True Diversity Receiver - ELRS R24-TD, your reliable companion for long-range RC control.

receivers.name: BETAFPV SuperD ELRS 915MHz Diversity Receiver
receivers.description: The BETAFPV SuperD ELRS Receiver is the first True Diversity Receiver that applies two antennas, dual receiver chains, and TCXO (temperature-compensated crystal oscillator) technology, achieving a super accurate frequency rate and excellent performance in extreme temperature environments.

receivers.name: FrSky TD SR18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
receivers.description: The FrSky TD SR18 combines an upgraded ADV Stabilizer function with traditional gyroscope stabilization modes. It features 5 additional channels and advanced pin mapping for diverse flight modes, such as Stabilization, Auto-Level, Hover, and Knife-Edge.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx Pro - NDAA
receivers.description: The TBS Crossfire Nano RX Pro is a higher telemetry output power option of the de-facto FPV standard receiver. This version is NDAA-compliant and made in the USA.

receivers.name: HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz RX-T Receiver w/ T-Antennas
receivers.description: The HGLRC ELRS 2.4GHz RX-T Receiver stands out with its compact design and versatile connectivity options, making it a convenient choice for RC enthusiasts.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Nano SE LR Receiver w/ Immortal-T V2 Antenna - NDAA
receivers.description: TBS takes long-range and UHF technology to the next level with the new and improved NDAA Version of the TBS Crossfire Nano SE LR Receiver.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx
receivers.description: TBS Crossfire Nano RX is for people who want to save space and solder. Full range, designed specifically for mini- and micro-quads!

receivers.name: RadioMaster Ranger 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
receivers.description: The RadioMaster Ranger 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a rugged CNC case and two module bay adapters.  This starter combo also includes additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

receivers.name: RadioMaster Ranger Micro 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
receivers.description: The RadioMaster Ranger Micro 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a JR module bay adapter, packet rates up to F-1000Hz, up to 1 Watt Power output, and a high-efficiency cooling system. This starter combo also includes additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

receivers.name: RadioMaster Ranger Nano 2.4Ghz ELRS Module - Starter Combo
receivers.description: The RadioMaster Ranger Nano 2.4GHz ELRS Module Starter Combo features a nano module bay adapter and additional RPI receivers and one RP2 Receiver.

receivers.name: RadioMaster ER5C-i ExpressLRS 2.4GHz PWM Receiver w/ Built-in Antenna
receivers.description: The RadioMaster ER5C-i receiver harnesses the advanced ExpressLRS system, offering exceptional reliability, customizable settings, rapid response, and extended reception range for an unparalleled user experience.

receivers.name: FrSky TD R18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver w/ Antennas
receivers.description: The FrSky TD R18 2.4GHz 900M Dual-Band Tandem Receiver is unlike any other FrSky 2.4Ghz or 900Mhz receiver. The TD R18 works simultaneously at both 900Mhz and 2.4Ghz frequencies.

receivers.name: FrSky Archer Plus GR8 2.4GHz ACCESS Receiver
receivers.description: The Archer line now includes the new Archer Plus Series, boasting enhanced features. These receivers offer improved anti-RF-interference capability, both ACCESS and ACCST D16 modes, and a Black-Box function for preserving flight data.

receivers.name: FrSky RB-40 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus w/ Menu Scroll Button & LCD Screen
receivers.description: The FrSky RB-40 24CH PWM Receiver Redundancy Bus w/ Menu Scroll Button & LCD Screen features Dual Power and Triple Receiver.

receivers.name: RadioMaster R86C V2 6CH PWM Receiver - D8/D16/SFHSS
receivers.description: The RadioMaster R86C V2 PWM Receiver has 6 channels (PWM) /8 channels (SBUS) and is Frsky D8/D16 + Futaba SFHSS compatible, offering a range suitable to drones and RC modelers.

receivers.name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - PWM ELRS-R24-P6
receivers.description: The MATEKSYS ELRS-R24-P6 is a PWM receiver with a 2.4GHz frequency and ExpressLRS 3.0 firmware.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Nano Rx Pro
receivers.description: The TBS Crossfire Nano RX Pro is a higher telemetry output power option of the de-facto FPV standard receiver. It packs up to 500mW of output power and will ensure that your 50km flights occur without ever losing telemetry.

receivers.name: MATEKSYS Crossfire to PWM Converter - CRSF PWM 6
receivers.description: The MATEKSYS CRSF PWM 6 is a Crossfire to PWM Converter with 2 UARTS and 6 PWM Outputs.  This converter supports any Crossfire Protocol receivers, such as the 433MHz, 868MHz, 915MHz, or 2.4GHz.

receivers.name: MATEKSYS Crossfire to PWM Converter - CRSF PWM C
receivers.description: The MATEKSYS CRSF PWM C is a Crossfire to PWM Converter with 2 UARTS and 10 PWM Outputs.  This converter supports any Crossfire Protocol receivers, such as the 433MHz, 868MHz, 915MHz, or 2.4GHz.

receivers.name: MATEKSYS ExpressLRS 2.4GHz Receiver - ELRS R24 D
receivers.description: The MATEKSYS ELRS R24 D Receiver is a 2.4GHz ExpressLRS diversity receiver with 22.5dbm Telemetry Power and two IPEX MHF 1 antennas.

receivers.name: Flysky FS-X14S AFHDS 2A Receiver
receivers.description: The Flysky X14S is one of the featured-filled AFHSD 2A receivers. Compatible with NV14, FS-TH9X, FS-I6, FS-i6X, FS-i4, and FS-i4X transmitters.

receivers.name: TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano Receiver - NDAA
receivers.description: TBS is once again pushing the limits of long-range flying with the NDAA Version of the TBS Crossfire Diversity Nano RX.

receivers.name: Happymodel ExpressLRS ES900TX + ES900RX Long Range Combo

This set of modules is characterized by ultra-long-range, stable operation, and low latency. They are compatible with most Opentx remote controllers.

receivers.name: Radiomaster R81 V2 8CH Frsky D8/D16/SFHSS Compatible Nano Rx w/Sbus

This R81 Nano Receiver (with Sbus Output) has 8 channels and is Frsky D8 compatible, offering a range suitable for both drone and RC modelers. These R series receivers are either compatible with Frsky D8 or D16 modes and are suitable for RC drones and aircraft, etc.

receivers.description: The Dragon Link Nano Receiver is a full range, fully filtered, fully shielded, full feature, full telemetry receiver. Dragon Link used the highest quality components and spent the extra money on filtering to give you the best performance possible from this receiver.

receivers.description: The FS-RX2A Pro V1  is an AFHDS 2A-compatible receiver in a minuscule form factor.

receivers.name: GEPRC Gemini Xrossband Receiver - ELRS 2.4Ghz/915Mhz
receivers.description: Unlock the full potential of long-range and reliable control with the GEPRC Gemini Xrossband Receiver - ExpressLRS 2.4GHz/915MHz. Built on Semtech’s cutting-edge LR1121 RF chip and developed from the open-source ExpressLRS project, this advanced dual-band receiver supports both sub-GHz (915MHz) and 2.4GHz bands—delivering seamless frequency switching and dual-band operation for superior link performance.

receivers.name: Holybro 500mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz)
receivers.description: The Holybro 500mW Transceiver Telemetry Radio Set V3 (915Mhz). Pixhawk 4 compatible.

receivers.name: ImmersionRC Ghost Atto Duo 2.4GHz Receiver
receivers.description: The Ghost Atto Duo is a high-end receiver by ImmersionRC for drone racing that combines two independent receiver channels, and twin antennas, to dramatically reduce lost packets during racing.

receivers.name: FrSky Delta 8 2.4Ghz 8CH Multi-Brand Receiver
receivers.description: FrSky Delta 8 2.4Ghz 8CH Multi-Brand Receiver - D8/V8 Futaba S-FHSS/FHSS Hitec AFHSS Compatible

receivers.name: FrSky RXSR-FC - OmniNXT F7 Flight Controller w/ Integrated R-XSR
receivers.description: The FrSky RXSR-FC (OMNINXT F7) is developed based on the newly designed NXT architecture. It is integrated with the RXSR receiver mounted in a protection box, and uses the trusty MPU6000 Gyro with an additional ICM20608 on top.

receivers.name: Jumper SF610 6CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
receivers.description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots.

receivers.name: Jumper SF810 8CH Full Range S-FHSS Receiver w/ SBUS PWM Output
receivers.description: The Jumper SF series of receivers offer a high quality yet affordable S-FHSS solution for RC pilots.

stacks.name: SkyStars Fly Stack - F722 HD Pro 4 FC + AM60 60A AM32 ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The Skystars F7HD Pro4 Flight Controller paired with the AM60A AM-32 32bit 4-in-1 ESC Fly Tower Stack represents a pinnacle in drone control technology, bundled in this Skystars F7+AM60 AM-32 Fly Stack.

stacks.name: Skystars Fly Stack - H743 Dual Gyro HD FC + KM60 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features a H743 Dual Gyro HD Flight Controller and a Kramam 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC with a 30x30 mounting pattern.

stacks.name: SkyStars Fly Stack - F722 HD Pro 3 OSD FC + KO60 60A 3-6S 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 128K ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features an F722 HD Pro 3 OSD flight controller and a KO60 60A BLHeli_32 4-in-1 128K ESC with a 30x30 mounting pattern!

stacks.name: GEPRC TAKER Stack - F405 FC+ 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
stacks.description: The GEPRC TAKER Stack - F405 FC+ 50A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC is a plug-and-play system designed for the DJI Air Unit.

stacks.name: Axisflying Argus PRO Plug & Play Stack - F722 FC + 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The Axisflying Argus PRO Plug & Play Stack - F722 FC + 55A 3-6S BLHeli_32 ESC - 30x30 features a full aluminum cover wrap for extra protection.

stacks.name: NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 200 RaceSpec Stack - F4 ELRS FC + 80A AM32 ESC - 20x20
stacks.description: The NewBeeDrone Hummingbird 200 RaceSpec Stack - F4 ELRS FC + 80A AM32 ESC -  is a purpose-built 20x20 flight stack designed from the ground up for competitive 5” FPV racing.

stacks.name: SkyStars Fly Stack - F405 HD2 FC + KO50 50A BLHeli_S ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The Skystars F4+KO50 Fly Stack showcases a synergized pairing between the F405 HD2 Flight Controller, featuring the precise BMI270 gyro, a 16MB black box for data retention, and a 5V/2A BEC, and the KO50 4in1 ESC, a robust unit supporting the efficient BLHeli_S protocol.

stacks.name: Axisflying Argus Mini Stack - F7 FC + 55A 4-6S ESC - 20x20
stacks.description: Upgrade your drone with the Axisflying Argus Mini Stack, featuring an F7 Flight Controller and 55A 4-6S ESC.

stacks.name: Flywoo GOKU V3 HD Stack - F4 FC + 20A 2-4S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC w/ LED + ELRS 2.4GHz - 16x16
stacks.description: The Flywoo GOKU V3 HD Stack combines high-performance components in a compact 16x16mm design, ideal for QUAD drone builds. Featuring an F4 flight controller and a 20A 2-4S 4-in-1 BLHeli_S ESC, this stack ensures smooth and reliable power delivery for your drone.

stacks.name: GEPRC FETtec Alpha Stack - G4 FC + 50A 2-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The co-branded GEPRC FETtec G4 Alpha GF50A Stack by GEPRC and FETTEC has been released.

stacks.name: Skystars Fly Stack - F411 Mini HD FC + KO40 40A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC - 20x20
stacks.description: The SkyStars Fly Stack features a F411 Mini HD Flight Controller and a Kramam 40A BLHeli_S 3-6S 4-in-1 ESC with a 20x20 mounting pattern.

stacks.name: Holybro F7 Stack - F722 Kakute FC - TEKKO32 F4 65A 4-in-1 ESC - 30.5 x 30.5
stacks.description: Introducing the Holybro Kakute F7 Stack: a powerful fusion of the Holybro Kakute F722 flight controller and TEKKO32 F4 65A 4-in-1 ESC.

stacks.name: SpeedyBee F405 V4 Stack - F4 V4 FC + 55A BLHeli_S ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: Elevate your drone's performance with the SpeedyBee F405 V4 Stack, featuring STM32F405 MCU and ICM42688P gyro for precise control.

stacks.name: Flycolor X-Tower F4 FC + 40A BLHeli32 4-in-1 ESC Stack
stacks.description: The Flycolor F4 40A Stack gives you all the essentials you need to get in the air and fly with the best components.

stacks.name: SpeedyBee F7 V3 Stack - F722 FC + 50A BLHeli_32 128K ESC - 30x30
stacks.description: The SpeedyBee F7 V3 Stack includes an F722 flight controller and a 50A 128K ESC.
