video_transmitters.name: WalleFPV Naked O4 Pro Air Unit
video_transmitters.description: The WalleFPV Naked O4 Pro Air Unit is here to make your ultra-lightweight HD FPV drones even lighter.

video_transmitters.name: CubePilot Herelink Blue Air Unit V1.1
video_transmitters.description: The Herelink Blue Air Unit V1.1 is a long-range digital video and data transmission module designed for seamless integration with the Herelink Blue system.

video_transmitters.name: CubePilot Herelink Blue Bundle V1.1
video_transmitters.description: The Herelink Blue V1.1 Bundle is an integrated remote controller, ground station, and wireless digital transmission system assembled and supported in the USA by NW Blue LLC.

video_transmitters.name: BETAFPV P1 Air Unit HD VTX
video_transmitters.description: The BETAFPV P1 Air Unit HD VTX delivers a stunning 1080p@60fps live feed with approximately 60ms latency and an impressive transmission range of over 5km.

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Whoop V2 Bundle (Nano V3 Camera)
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Whoop V2 Bundle (Nano V3 Camera) has everything you need to upgrade your tiny whoop or micro drone to HD clarity!

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Whoop V2 VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Whoop V2 VTX produces sharp, low-latency HD video up to 200 mW while supporting all HDZero MIPI camera modes.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Pro Kit - 32GB w/ Dual Antennas
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Pro Kit utilizes cutting-edge H.265 coding, ensuring top-tier 1080p FPV visuals while maintaining minimal latency.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar VRX Bundle - HD Pro Kit 32GB + Gyro + Dual Antennas
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Pro VRX Bundle utilizes cutting-edge H.265 coding, ensuring top-tier 1080p FPV visuals while maintaining minimal latency. It supports 1080P at 60FPS and 720P at 120FPS, delivering exceptional image quality.

video_transmitters.name: EMAX Wyvern Link (Alpha) V2 800mW VTX w/ OpenIPC + Aluminum Case
video_transmitters.description: Introducing the EMAX Wyvern Link (Alpha) 800mW VTX V2 + Case - a powerful, long-range FPV system built for smooth, stable HD video transmission.

video_transmitters.name: RunCam WifiLink 2-G w/ OpenIPC
video_transmitters.description: Unlock the future of FPV with the RunCam WiFiLink 2-G w/ OpenIPC, a cutting-edge HD video system built on the powerful OpenIPC open-source platform.

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX Kit
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX Kit is a 2nd generation 5.8GHz digital video transmitter kit with a camera, VTX, and antenna that can fit most of the 3.5-inch and 5-inch drones.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar VRX Bundle - HD Kit V2 32GB + Gyro
video_transmitters.description: This Walksnail Avatar VRX Bundle features built-in 32GB storage and Gyroflow support. The 2K/120fps/4:3 native sensor camera allows you to capture more of the surrounding scenery while flying the drone, resulting in more comprehensive and visually appealing images.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar VRX Bundle - HD Mini 1S + Gyro
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Mini VRX Bundle features a VRX, nano digital camera, antenna, and Mini VTX that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar Repeater
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar Repeater extends FPV range and ensures reliable, stable video transmission in challenging environments.

video_transmitters.name: DJI O4 Air Unit
video_transmitters.description: The DJI O4 Air Unit redefines video transmission with improved resolution, lower latency, and extended range. At just 8.2 grams, it integrates a 1/2-inch image sensor that records 4K/60fps video, delivering an ideal combination of performance and portability.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Kit V2 - 32GB w/ Gyro
video_transmitters.description: This Walksnail Avatar HD Kit V2 features built-in 32GB storage and Gyroflow support.

video_transmitters.name: TrueRC X-AIR 5.8GHz MK II Antenna Stubby Combo for HDZero VRX4 - RHCP
video_transmitters.description: Our high-efficiency TrueRC X-AIR MK II transforms into a sleek, low-profile face mount for the HDzero VRX4 module.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Moonlight Kit - 4K FPV System
video_transmitters.description: Boasting 4k/60fps, amazing low light detail, EIS and Gyroflow technology, and a host of other features - the Walksnail Moonlight aims to be the HD system on all your frames!

video_transmitters.name: HGLRC Specter AIO - F411 ELRS FC + 10A 1-2S BLHeli_S ESC + 400mw VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HLRC Specter AIO is a remarkable piece of technology, combining an ultra-light F411 10A 1-2S AIO brushless flight controller, a cutting-edge SPI ExpressLRS 2.4G receiver with patch ceramic antennas, and a versatile 400mW 5.8GHz adjustable power video transmission.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD VTX V2 Module - 32GB Dual Antennas Version
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD VTX V2 is a versatile VTX module compatible with dual antennas.

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Freestyle V2 VTX is a 2nd generation 5.8GHz digital video transmitter that can fit most of the 3.5-inch and 5-inch drones.

video_transmitters.name: Flywoo Naked O3 Upgrade Case Kit
video_transmitters.description: FLYWOO designed the O3 Upgrade Case Kit, reducing weight by 50% respectively.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Mini 1S Lite Kit w/ Heat sink
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Lite Camera / Mini 1S VTX Kit features a lite digital camera, antenna, and mini VTX (with heat sink) that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD VTX Module V2 - 8GB
video_transmitters.description: This Walksnail Avatar HD VTX Module V2 features built-in 8GB storage without Gyroflow support.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Mini 1S Kit
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Camera / Mini 1S VTX Kit features a nano digital camera, antenna, and Mini VTX that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar VRX / Kits
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar VRX transmits 1080P/60fps with industry-leading H.265 encoding technology, which can provide a minimum delay of 22ms and a maximum resolution of 1080p. Enjoy clear HD video to take your FPV experience to the next level!

video_transmitters.name: CubePilot Herelink HD Air Unit V1.1
video_transmitters.description: The Herelink Air Unit Integrates a data link unit, remote control link, and video display unit into a single device, making a complex device system integrated and miniaturized.

video_transmitters.name: TBS Unify Pro32 DP VTX - NDAA
video_transmitters.description: The TBS UNIFY PRO32 DP with an MMCX connector is a high-quality video transmitter (VTX) designed for use in FPV drones. This is an NDAA version.

video_transmitters.name: Speedybee TX800 5.8GHz VTX
video_transmitters.description: The Speedybee TX800 is a small, yet powerful VTX. Capable of 800mW output all while fitting in a 20x20mm mounting pattern. The integrated heatsink keeps dangerous heat away from sensitive electronics.

video_transmitters.name: Happymodel ExpressLRS F4 5A 5-in-1 AIO FC w/ Built-in 2.4GHz Rx
video_transmitters.description: The Happymodel ExpressLRS F4 is the world's first AIO 5-in-1 whoop flight controller with a built-in high-performance 2.4GHz ELRS receiver. This F4 flight controller has a built-in 5A ESC, 5.8GHz VTX, and OSD. This AIO is made for 1S long-range and tiny whoops.

video_transmitters.name: XILO STAX 5.8GHz FPV Video Transmitter (25-600mW) w/ Smart Audio
video_transmitters.description: The The XILO STAX 5.8GHz FPV Video Transmitter (25-600mW) w/ Smart Audio comes fully featured at an incredible price!

video_transmitters.name: XILO Pit Pal VTX Power Switch
video_transmitters.description: The XILO Pit Pal VTX Power Switch allows you to remotely power on/off your video transmitter or other devices with this simple board connected to your flight controller.

video_transmitters.name: TBS 1.2GHz VRX Notch Filter (868/915 MHz)
video_transmitters.description: Getting fuzzy video on your 1.2-1.3GHz receiver when using crossfire? This filter improves video reception for 1.2-1.3GHz video receivers in combination with TBS Crossfire.

video_transmitters.name: TBS Unify Pro32 Nano 5G8 V1.1 500mW Video Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: With the TBS UNIFY PRO32 Nano we have boosted the output power, improved the robustness, decreased the power consumption, added capability for insane features and perfected the way it is installed in your multirotor. In a nutshell, it’s the most comprehensive, future proof, highest quality and overall best nano VTx ever made. V1.1

video_transmitters.description: Integrating DJI's cutting-edge video transmission technology into a lightweight and compact body, the DJI O3 Air Unit features excellent video transmission quality with high definition and low latency - even at long distances.

video_transmitters.name: DJI O3 Air Unit Transmission Module
video_transmitters.description: The DJI O3 Air Unit Transmission Module will take your FPV experience to a whole new level all in a lightweight and compact design!

video_transmitters.name: DJI Transmission Combo
video_transmitters.description: The DJI Transmission incorporates O3 Pro video transmission technology, which offers an incredible 6km/20,000ft on-ground transmission distance.

video_transmitters.description: The Immersion RC Ghost Ultimate Hybrid 5.8GHz VTX & 2.4GHz takes the innovative Ghost Hybrid concept to a new level, with the traditional long-range/low latency Ghost uplink, and a high-power Tramp video transmitter, packaged in a beautiful anodized heatsink.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Camera + Mini 1S VTX Kit
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Camera / Mini Lite 1S VTX Kit features a nano digital camera, antenna, and mini VTX that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: CubePilot Herelink 2.4GHz Long Range HD Video Transmission System - V1.1
video_transmitters.description: The Herelink HD Digital Video Transmission System is an all-in-one solution for long-range HD video transmission. Brought to you by CubePilot, the team who brought you Pixhawk and The Cube GPS system.

video_transmitters.name: Happymodel ELRS Fyujon V1.0 AIO Board - 5.8GHz OPENVTX + 2.4GHz ERLS RX
video_transmitters.description: The Happymodel ELRS Fyujon is a very simple and easy-to-use 2-in-1 module that integrates 5.8GHz video transmission and a 2.4GHz ELRS receiver.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Kit
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Camera / VTX Kit features a nano-sized digital camera and VTX that works with HD Goggles such as the Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Camera / VTX Kit
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Camera / VTX Kit features a digital camera and VTX that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV Rush Tank Race II 5.8GHz VTX w/ SmartAudio
video_transmitters.description: Introducing... the RushFPV Rush Tank Race II 5.8GHz Video Transmitter - now even smaller and lighter!

video_transmitters.name: DJI Digital HD FPV Air Unit Kit - Original Version
video_transmitters.description: The Original DJI Digital HD FPV Air Unit Kit is back - Limited Quantities Available! This is the original DJI Air Unit with 120fps HD camera.

video_transmitters.name: MATEKSYS VTX-1G3SE 2CH Video Transmitter - 1.2GHz/1.3GHz (U.S. Version)
video_transmitters.description: The MATEKSYS 1G3SE Video Transmitter works on both 1.2GHz and 1.3GHz frequencies. This VTX comes with a Dipole SMA Antenna and features 2 US channels, an SMA connector, button control, LED indicators, and more!

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Whoop HD FPV Divimath Video Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Whoop VTX is a digital HD 720p 60fps video transmitter capable of delivering up to 200mw on 5.8GHz. It works with the Shark Byte RX5.1 goggle module and a remote controller to transmit video and wirelessly control the parameters for the transmitter and camera.

video_transmitters.name: Caddx Naked Vista Unit w/ Nebula Pro Camera
video_transmitters.description: Save 10g of weight in your builds by using a Naked Vista kit!

video_transmitters.name: Caddx Naked Vista Unit w/ Polar Camera
video_transmitters.description: Save 10g of weight in your builds by using a Naked Vista kit!

video_transmitters.name: RunCam Link Phoenix HD FPV Camera Kit
video_transmitters.description: The new HD system from Runcam combines a digital HD transceiver, the Link Digital Air Unit, and the RunCam Phoenix HD Camera.

video_transmitters.name: Caddx Polar Micro Digital FPV Air Unit Camera Kit
video_transmitters.description: Caddx Polar Micro Digital FPV Air Unit Camera Kit is an advanced video transmission module that supports a 5.8GHz digital video signal and 720p 120fps image transmission.

video_transmitters.name: Caddx Polar Micro Digital FPV Vista Camera Kit
video_transmitters.description: Caddx Polar Micro Digital FPV Air Unit Camera Kit is an advanced video transmission module that supports a 5.8GHz digital video signal and 720p 60fps image transmission.

video_transmitters.name: Happymodel ExpressLRS ES24TX 2.4GHz Micro TX Module
video_transmitters.description: This Micro TX is designed by Happymodel and based on the open-source ExpressLRS which is a very popular low latency and high re-flashed rate RF module for RC Airplane and FPV Racing. Its main hardware architecture is ESP32, ESP8285, and the SX1280 RF chip. The ES24TX module is a complete solution that is plug and play and already pre-loaded with Expresslrs firmware.

video_transmitters.name: Happymodel ExpressLRS 3D Printed JR Bay for ES24TX / ES915TX
video_transmitters.description: This is a 3D Printed JR Bay for the Happymodel ExpressLRS ES24TX / ES915TX.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV Rush Tank SOLO 1W 5.8GHz VTX
video_transmitters.description: This Rush FPV Tank SOLO VTX is the latest in ultimate VTX power. The Tank SOLO is equipped with a SmartAudio Control protocol, and 48 frequency channels, and full channel calibration. This VTX has 7-36V Input, 5V Output, and an 800mW Max Power level. The Heat Sink design with sturdy aluminum casing is perfect for all of your high-powered FPV needs.

video_transmitters.name: HGLRC Zeus Nano 350mW 16mm/20mm/25.5mm VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HGLRC Zeus NANO Video Transmitter is ultralight and has multiple mounting patterns... including 16mm, 20mm, and 25.5mm. With a built-in microphone and slim boomerang shape, this VTX brings real-time audio transmission and a wider scope of application.

video_transmitters.name: HGLRC Zeus 800mW Smart Mounting 20x20 / 30x30 VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HGLRC Zeus 800mW Smart Mounting VTX gives you rock-solid performance in a 20x20mm and 30x30 video transmitter.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV 30X30 Plastic Board For VTX
video_transmitters.description: A RUSHFPV plastic board for VTXs or radio receivers (30x30).

video_transmitters.name: ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 20x20 Pack
video_transmitters.description: The ImmersionRC Ghost Proton 20x20 Pack is a printed circuit board (PCB) designed to dramatically simplify wiring, mounting, and cooling of Tramp Nano + Ghost combinations.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV RUSH BLADE F722 FC & 50A 30x30 & RUSH Tank Ⅱ VTX & RUSH PFB Stack/Combo
video_transmitters.description: The RUSH BLADE F722 Stack for analog by RUSHFPV features the RUSH TANK II 5.8GHz VTX, RUSH BLADE F722 Flight Controller, RUSH BLADE 50A 3-6S BLHeli_32 4-in-1 ESC (Sports Edition), and the RUSH Power Filter Board (PFB), which can handle up to 6S input voltage and push your FPV racer to the max.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV RUSH TANK II Ultimate 5.8GHz VTX w/ Smart Audio
video_transmitters.description: The RUSH TANK II by RUSHFPV is a high-quality 5.8GHz VTX that comes with four adjustable levels of transmitter power, PIT/25/200/500/800/mW.

video_transmitters.name: RushFPV Ultra-small External Automatic Gain Control VTX Microphone
video_transmitters.description: The RUSHFPV AGC Microphone module is perfect for the  RUSHFPV RUSH 20x20 Mini Stack.

video_transmitters.name: BETAFPV M02 25-350mW 5.8GHz VTX
video_transmitters.description: The M02 VTX by BETAFPV is a high-quality 5.8GHz VTX that comes with four adjustable power, including 25mW, 100mW, 200mW and 350mW. With 350mW output power, pilots can fly drones up to 600 meters away to explore more possibilities and fun!

video_transmitters.name: Flywoo GOKU GN413S 13A 2-4S AIO Toothpick FC + VTX625 Stack
video_transmitters.description: The Flywoo GOKU GN413S AIO Toothpick FC combined with the GOKU VTX625 VTX brings lots of cool features to your small builds!

video_transmitters.name: ImmersionRC Tramp Nano 5.8Ghz Video Transmitter (US Version)
video_transmitters.description: The ImmersionRC Highest Power in a Tiny Package Only 18x13mm, and weighing in at a paltry 1.01g, the Tramp Nano packs quite a punch. Given adequate airflow, output powers of > 500mW (typically 700mW+) are emitted.

video_transmitters.name: BETAFPV A01 25-200mW 5.8GHz VTX
video_transmitters.description: Tiny, light and durable A01 VTX, comes with a port to connect with FC and mounting holes to fix on the canopy, convenient for installation. Compatible with Beta75X FPV (3S), Beta75X HD (3S), Beta85X FPV (4S), Beta85X 4K and HX100.

video_transmitters.name: Lumenier LUX Mini 20x20 5.8GHz FPV Video Transmitter (25-800mW)
video_transmitters.description: The Lumenier LUX Mini brings high-powered video transmission into a tiny 20x20 package. Feature packed with Smart Audio, plastic cover, MMCX antenna, accessories and more.

video_transmitters.name: Rush Tank Ultimate Plus 5.8GHz VTX w/ Smart Audio
video_transmitters.description: The Rush Tank Ultimate Plus is a high-quality 5.8GHz VTX with strong anti-interference ability and stable transmission.

video_transmitters.name: FXT ARES 5.8GHz PIT/25mw/200mw/600mw/1W VTX w/ Smart Audio
video_transmitters.description: The FXT ARES 5.8Ghz 1W w/ Smart Audio is a professional FPV video transmitter that includes PIT mode, which allows you to power up your quad with zero interference!

video_transmitters.name: HGLRC Forward 5.8GHz 48CH 25/50/100/200/400mW VTX
video_transmitters.description: Forward VTX is simulated 5.8GHz ISM band transmission with stable output power, long transmission distance, and strong power filter.

video_transmitters.name: TBS Unify EVO 5.8GHz Video Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: TBS knows video transmitters, and their latest creation merges the best qualities of multiple VTX's into one. The Unify EVO aims to satisfy the video needs of every pilot!

video_transmitters.name: Sp Racing Stacking Vtx Board Without Vtx Module
video_transmitters.description: Stackable VTX board to enable direct solder of TBS Unify, RTC6705, or XM+ diversity receiver with your SP Racing F7 Dual FC or SP Racing H7 EXTREME.

video_transmitters.name: Lumenier SM-25 25mW Micro VTX - U.FL SMA
video_transmitters.description: A micro 25mw VTx for FPV with a dipole antenna for use on micro and mini drones.

video_transmitters.name: Lumenier SM-25 25mW Micro VTX - Dipole Antenna
video_transmitters.description: A micro 25mw VTx for FPV with a dipole antenna for use on micro and mini drones.

video_transmitters.name: Lumenier Aluminum Heat Sink
video_transmitters.description: A heat sink from Lumenier to cool and regulate your transmitter.

video_transmitters.name: Board Replacement for Plug & Play Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: Make your non Plug & Play transmitter to a Plug & Play version.

video_transmitters.name: 1.3GHz 400mW Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: 1.3GHz 400mw Transmitter with legal US channels.

video_transmitters.name: IBCrazy 1.3 GHz Pass/2.4 GHz Stop Notch Filter
video_transmitters.description: The updated IBCrazy (VAS) 1.3/2.4 GHz Notch Filter is a new innovative product from Alex Greve (IBCrazy). This notch filter allows you to fly 2.4GHz control with 1.3GHz video. Place it on your video transmitter to greatly increase the range of your 2.4GHz control system.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Kit V3
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar HD Nano Kit V3 features 32GB of built-in storage, and supports 1080P/60fps, with a 4:3 native sensor that provides smooth and stunning images.

video_transmitters.name: 5.8GHz 32CH A/V 500mW Video Transmitter (TS58500) - (International Version)
video_transmitters.description: 5.8GHz 32CH A/V 500mW Transmitter (TS58500)

video_transmitters.name: 1.3GHz 800mW Transmitter
video_transmitters.description: 1.3 GHz Transmitter with legal US channels.

video_transmitters.name: 1.3GHz 400mW Video Transmitter 9 Channels - (International Version)
video_transmitters.description: High Quality 400mW 1.3GHz Transmitter 9 Channels- International Version

video_transmitters.name: FatShark 2p/2p Molex 30cm
video_transmitters.description: FatShark 2p/2p Molex 30cm

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Whoop Lite Bundle (Nano V3 Camera)
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Whoop Lite Bundle is exactly what you need to transform your 1S Whoop for the digital FPV world! Updated to include Nano V3 Camera.

video_transmitters.name: HDZero Whoop Lite VTX
video_transmitters.description: The HDZero Whoop Lite VTX is a digital HD 720p 60fps video transmitter capable of delivering up to 200mw on 5.8GHz. It is designed for racing

video_transmitters.name: 1.3GHz 800mW Video Transmitter 9 Channels - (International Version)
video_transmitters.description: High Quality 800mW 1.3GHz Transmitter 9 Channels- International Version

video_transmitters.name: FatShark 2p Molex/2p RC Tx Power Cable
video_transmitters.description: Fat Shark 2p Molex/2p RC Tx replacement power cable.

video_transmitters.name: WhiteNoiseFPV Unify Pro VTX Mounting Board V2/V3 - HV/Race/MMCX
video_transmitters.description: Mount your Unify VTX flush with the rest of your electronics stack with the WhiteNoiseFPV Unify Mounting Board.

video_transmitters.name: Walksnail Avatar HD VTX Module
video_transmitters.description: The Walksnail Avatar VTX is a lightweight HD system that works with HD Goggles such as the Walksnail Avatar and Fat Shark HD Dominator.

video_transmitters.name: VAS Pepperbox XTREME 1.3GHz Antenna (RHCP)
video_transmitters.description: The ultimate long range antenna. The Pepperbox XTREME from VAS.

video_transmitters.name: WhiteNoiseFPV Unify Pro VTX Mounting Board V2.2 - Pro V2/V3(5V only) & Nano
video_transmitters.description: Mount your Unify VTX flush with the rest of your electronics stack with the WhiteNoiseFPV Unify Mounting Board.

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems MPU5 — Wave Relay Smart Radio
mesh_radios.description: The MPU5 is a handheld 3x3 MIMO MANET smart radio running Wave Relay OS (custom Android). Integrates data, video, voice, PTT audio, GPS, and onboard compute in a single ruggedized IP68 unit. Self-forming/self-healing peer-to-peer mesh with no master node, no hop limit, and no node limit. Interchangeable Frequency Module architecture supports L-band through upper C-band. FIPS 140-2 Level 2 validated. Blue UAS certified. Wave Relay IRD provides EW countermeasures assessed by DoD.
mesh_radios.encryption: CTR-AES-256, SHA-256 HMAC, FIPS 140-2 Level 2, NSA CSfC approved
mesh_radios.max_hops: No limit (38 hops / 31 miles demonstrated subterranean)
mesh_radios.ew_capability: Wave Relay IRD — DoD-assessed EW countermeasure library

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems Embedded Module — SWaP-Optimized MANET for UAS/UGV
mesh_radios.description: Low-SWaP version of the MPU5 designed for integration into UAVs, UGVs, and sensors. Same Wave Relay MANET, same IFM architecture, same mesh protocol. Combines communication, computing, and video subsystems into a single 90.7g module. Onboard Android compute enables swarming algorithms and autonomy applications directly on the radio. FIPS 140-2 Level 2 validated. Blue UAS certified. Pre-certified MIL-STD-461 RE102 for EMI/EMC.
mesh_radios.form_factor: embedded module (2.00 x 3.29 x 0.59 in / 5.08 x 8.35 x 1.49 cm)
mesh_radios.frequency_architecture: Interchangeable Frequency Module (IFM) — stackable or ribbon-cable separated

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-1100 — L-Band IFM (1350–1390 MHz)
mesh_radios.description: L-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module for MPU5 and Embedded Module. Military band (1350–1390 MHz). Longer wavelength provides extended range with omnidirectional antennas — ideal for aviation applications. 3x3 MIMO, 6W aggregate TX power.

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-1350HP — High Power L-Band IFM
mesh_radios.description: High Power L-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module. Delivers increased output power and greater power efficiency for military and overseas customers. Provides increased noise immunity in congested and contested RF environments.

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-2000 — BAS Band IFM (2025–2150 MHz)
mesh_radios.description: Broadcast Auxiliary Service band module for TV/radio stations. Licensed spectrum — no monthly fees. Live event video streaming and electronic newsgathering.

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-2150 — S-Band IFM (2200–2507 MHz)
mesh_radios.description: S-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module covering Federal (2200–2290 MHz), Commercial Licensed (2300–2400 MHz), and ISM (2412–2462 MHz) ranges. FCC Part 15 certified for ISM. Ideal for urban environments where S-Band wavelength provides superior RF reflections and building penetration.
mesh_radios.primary_users: Federal, commercial, ISM band users, urban operations

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-4100 — Lower C-Band IFM (4400–5000 MHz)
mesh_radios.description: Lower C-Band module for NATO (4.4–4.6 GHz), Federal/DHS/DOJ (4.6–4.8 GHz), and Public Safety (4.9 GHz) customers. Less congested spectrum than S-Band. Required for multiple UGV Programs of Record.
mesh_radios.primary_users: NATO, Federal, Public Safety, UGV programs

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems RF-5100 — Upper C-Band IFM (5100–6000 MHz)
mesh_radios.description: Upper C-Band module for unlicensed ISM band (5.1–5.9 GHz). FCC Part 15 and Japan Type certified. Less congested than 2.4 GHz ISM. 4W aggregate TX power (1.3W per chain). Allows defense customers to blend into commercial 5 GHz traffic in urban areas.
mesh_radios.primary_users: Commercial, defense (LPI in urban), UAV operators

mesh_radios.name: Persistent Systems GVR5 — Dual-Band Vehicle MANET
mesh_radios.description: Dual-band Wave Relay MANET solution for tracked/wheeled ground vehicles and aircraft. Available in C+L, C+S, and L+S band combinations. Integrates with vehicle LAN, intercom, SATCOM/LTE. Two HD video encoders. Hardened against electronic warfare.

mesh_radios.name: Doodle Labs Mini OEM — Mesh Rider Radio (2.4 GHz)
mesh_radios.description: Compact mesh radio for drone integration. OpenWRT-based with batman-adv mesh protocol. SSH-accessible. Small enough for 5-inch quads. Configurable OGM interval for fast-moving platforms.

mesh_radios.name: Doodle Labs Helix Smart Radio — Defense Mesh (L/S/C Band)
mesh_radios.description: Defense-grade mesh radio covering L, S, and C bands. MIMO with higher TX power than Mini series. Designed for tactical UAV/UGV operations. OpenWRT platform with enhanced RF front-end.

mesh_radios.name: Silvus Technologies StreamCaster SC4200 — MANET Radio
mesh_radios.description: Custom MIMO MANET radio with TDMA-based MAC layer for deterministic latency. Up to 100 Mbps throughput. Multicast-aware mesh for video streaming. Strong defense/government customer base. Closed platform — configured via web GUI.

mesh_radios.name: Rajant BreadCrumb — Dual-Radio Mesh Node
mesh_radios.description: Dual-radio mesh architecture — each node has two radios on different bands for simultaneous TX/RX, avoiding half-duplex throughput penalty. InstaMesh protocol handles mobility. Strong industrial track record (mining, oil & gas).

drone_models.name: Apex Freestyle 5"
drone_models.description: The quintessential 5-inch freestyle quad. Built around the proven TBS Source One V6 frame and Axisflying 2207.5 motors on 6S, this build delivers explosive power and predictable handling for flips, rolls, power loops, and proximity flying. HAKRC F722 stack keeps things simple with a single-board FC+ESC solution. Analog 5.8GHz video keeps weight down and latency minimal. ELRS 2.4GHz for rock-solid control link. The go-to build for pilots stepping up from beginner quads or building their first custom rig.

drone_models.name: Venom Racer 5"
drone_models.description: Purpose-built 5-inch race quad optimized for gate speed and low lap times. The HGLRC MY5 frame sheds every unnecessary gram while maintaining crash durability. High-KV 2207 2120KV motors paired with a 60A ESC deliver instant throttle response on 6S. Separate FC and ESC allow individual replacement after race crashes. Lightweight analog video system and RadioMaster ELRS nano receiver keep the all-up weight under 300g dry. Built for competitive MultiGP and FAI racing.

drone_models.name: Cloudwalker HD 5"
drone_models.description: Premium 5-inch HD freestyle build designed for pilots who want crystal-clear digital video without sacrificing flight performance. The FlyFishRC Volador II VX5 frame is specifically engineered for DJI O4/Walksnail camera mounting. Axisflying Argus ECO stack pairs an F4 FC with a 60A ESC for reliable power delivery. Walksnail Avatar HD Pro camera feeds stunning 1080p video to your goggles. True diversity ELRS receiver ensures bulletproof link in urban and mountain environments. This is the build for YouTube-quality FPV footage.

drone_models.name: Horizon Scout 7" Long Range
drone_models.description: 7-inch long range explorer built for 20+ minute flights and 10+ km range. VCI Hobby ARES 2808 1350KV motors spin efficient 7-inch props at low RPM for maximum flight time on 6S Li-Ion packs. H743 flight controller runs GPS Rescue for automatic return-to-home on signal loss. Flywoo GOKU GPS module provides fast satellite fix. ELRS true diversity receiver on 2.4GHz ensures control link integrity at distance. HDZero video system delivers low-latency digital video. This is a serious long range platform for pilots exploring mountain ranges, coastlines, and backcountry terrain.

drone_models.name: Voyager LR6 6" Cruiser
drone_models.description: Efficient 6-inch long range cruiser optimized for smooth cinematic flights and maximum endurance. Lumenier 2307 JohnnyFPV V3 Pro motors deliver silky-smooth throttle response at low KV, perfect for cinematic orbits and long glides. 6S Li-Ion battery pack provides 15-25 minute flight times depending on flying style. GPS rescue and ELRS long range link provide safety margin for flights beyond visual line of sight. Designed for pilots who prioritize flight time and video quality over acrobatic performance.

drone_models.name: Atlas X 10" CineLifter
drone_models.description: Heavy-lift 10-inch cinelifter designed to carry full-size cinema cameras (GoPro, Sony A6000, RED Komodo) for professional aerial cinematography. iFlight XING2 3110 motors at 900KV provide massive torque on 6S while maintaining efficiency. Lumenier Siege 80A ESC handles the sustained high-current draw of large propellers under camera payload. Lumenier LUX H743 FC with dual IMU provides rock-solid stabilization. 9-inch MacroQuad propellers generate enormous thrust with low noise. This platform is for commercial filmmakers and cinema FPV operators who need reliability and payload capacity above all else.

drone_models.name: Stealth Hawk 5" Premium
drone_models.description: No-compromise premium 5-inch freestyle build using top-tier components throughout. Orqa QuadCore H7 FC with ICM42688 IMU for the cleanest gyro data and fastest PID loop processing. Holybro Tekko32 65A AM32 ESC provides headroom for aggressive flying with zero desync risk. Axisflying 2207.5 motors deliver consistent performance session after session. HDZero Freestyle V2 digital video for the lowest latency HD feed available. True diversity ELRS ensures control link never drops. Built for experienced pilots who demand the absolute best from every component.

drone_models.name: First Flight 5" Beginner
drone_models.description: Budget-friendly 5-inch freestyle build designed as the ideal first custom drone. Every component is chosen for reliability, ease of assembly, and forgiveness during the learning curve. HAKRC F722 stack simplifies wiring with a single FC+ESC board. Foxeer Micro Cat 4 camera and SpeedyBee TX800 VTX provide solid analog video at a fraction of digital system costs. Lower-KV 1960KV motors on 6S give smooth, predictable power delivery that won't catch beginners off guard. Total build cost under $250 USD excluding battery and radio equipment. Perfect for pilots graduating from simulators to real flight.

drone_models.name: CineMaster 7" Cinema
drone_models.description: 7-inch cinematic platform tuned for buttery-smooth footage. T-Motor VELOX V2808 cinematic motors at 1300KV deliver ultra-smooth throttle response with minimal vibration, critical for jello-free video. Lumenier Siege 80A ESC provides ample current headroom for the larger props. Gemfan Hurricane 7050 tri-blade props balanced for cinema work. The entire build philosophy prioritizes low vibration, smooth power delivery, and long flight times over raw acrobatic performance. Ideal for real estate, commercial, and nature cinematography shoots.

drone_models.name: ThunderBolt 5" Power
drone_models.description: High-power 5-inch build for pilots who want maximum thrust-to-weight ratio. VCI Hobby Yuki Savage 2207 2120KV motors paired with Holybro Tekko32 65A AM32 ESC deliver explosive acceleration and instant throttle response. Higher KV motors on 6S push the power envelope, requiring a beefy ESC to match. Orqa QuadCore H7 FC processes the fastest PID loops for locked-in handling at extreme speeds. This is the build for power loops, juicy flicks, and aggressive proximity flying where raw power makes the difference.

drone_models.name: Nomad Explorer 7" Ultra LR
drone_models.description: Ultra long range 7-inch explorer built for maximum distance and flight time. EMAX ECO II 2807 1300KV motors spin 7-inch bi-blade props at the efficiency sweet spot for 6S Li-Ion packs. Lumenier NAV 6000mAh 6S 18650 Li-Ion battery provides 25-35 minute flight times in cruise. GPS rescue with compass-equipped Flywoo GOKU Pro module ensures safe return from beyond visual range. ELRS true diversity 2.4GHz receiver maintains control link at 15+ km. Every component choice prioritizes range and endurance over performance. For mountain crossings, coastline exploration, and pushing the boundaries of what a quad can reach.

drone_models.name: Phantom 6" Digital LR
drone_models.description: Premium 6-inch digital long range cruiser combining HD video quality with extended range capability. Ethix Mr Steele Stout 2307 V5 1950KV motors provide the perfect balance of efficiency and responsiveness for 6-inch props on 6S. HDZero Freestyle V2 digital video delivers the lowest-latency HD feed for confident flying at distance. Compass-equipped GPS module enables position-aware features and GPS rescue. iFlight BLITZ H743 FC handles GPS processing, RPM filtering, and HD OSD simultaneously without breaking a sweat. For pilots who want the best video quality on a long range platform.

drone_models.name: DJI Matrice 350 RTK
drone_models.description: DJI flagship enterprise platform. Triple gimbal, 55-min flight time, DJI O3 Enterprise transmission (2.4/5.8 GHz, 20 km), IP55. Supports Zenmuse H30/H30T, L2, L1, P1 payloads. E-Port for companion computers. NOT NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: DJI Matrice 30T
drone_models.description: DJI mid-tier enterprise drone. Integrated quad-sensor (48MP zoom, 12MP wide, 640x512 thermal, LRF). 41-min flight, DJI O3 Enterprise, IP55. DJI Dock compatible. NOT NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: Autel EVO MAX 4T V2
drone_models.description: Autel flagship enterprise. Quad-sensor gimbal (50MP wide, 48MP zoom 10x optical, 640x512 thermal, LRF 1200m). SkyLink 3.0 (900/2.4/5.2/5.8 GHz), GPS-denied SLAM flight, A-Mesh drone-to-drone networking, AES-256, 42-min flight. XE variant is NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: Skydio X10D
drone_models.description: Skydio defense variant. Best-in-class AI autonomy, NVIDIA Jetson Orin, six 32MP nav cameras, FLIR Boson+ 640x512 thermal. GPS-denied flight, NightSense zero-light ops. Open MAVLink, RAS-A compliant. Blue UAS listed. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Freefly Astro
drone_models.description: American-made PX4 mapping/inspection drone. Auterion Skynode FC, triple-redundant IMU, MAVLink native, Smart Dovetail payload swap, 61MP Sony LR1, Doodle Labs radio, LTE. Blue UAS certified. 25-min flight, 2 lb payload. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Inspired Flight IF1200A
drone_models.description: Heavy-lift hexacopter built to USAF standards. ArduPilot firmware, MAVLink, 19.1 lb payload (Part 107), 43-min flight, SAFE motor-out redundancy. Universal payload interface for LiDAR, EO/IR, Phase One. Blue UAS, NDAA, Green UAS certified. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Teal 2
drone_models.description: Compact ISR drone optimized for night ops. FLIR Hadron 640R (640x512 radiometric thermal, 16MP EO). 30-min flight, 2.75 lb, AES-256 encrypted, modular/field-repairable. Blue UAS certified. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Parrot ANAFI USA
drone_models.description: Ultra-light enterprise drone (500g). Triple sensor (32x zoom, wide, FLIR Boson 320 thermal). 32-min flight. GOV (WiFi) and MIL (Microhard radio) variants. Blue UAS listed. NDAA compliant. French-designed.

drone_models.name: Anduril Ghost X
drone_models.description: Medium-range military reconnaissance drone. Helicopter-type design, 80-90 min endurance, ~15 mi range, 11 kg payload. Anduril Lattice AI autonomy. Blue UAS. Combat-proven in Ukraine. Govt/mil procurement only. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Holybro X500 V2 + Pixhawk 6X
drone_models.description: Reference PX4/ArduPilot development platform. Carbon fiber, no-solder assembly, Pixhawk 6X (STM32H753, triple IMU, Ethernet), M10 GPS, SiK telemetry. Mounts for RPi, Jetson, RealSense. ~18 min flight. NOT NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: DJI Agras T50
drone_models.description: Agricultural spraying/spreading drone. Coaxial twin-rotor, 40 kg spray / 50 kg spread payload. Dual atomizing system, phased array radar, 52 acres/hr. D-RTK cm-level positioning. DJI Terra mapping. NOT NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: DJI FlyCart 30
drone_models.description: Heavy-lift delivery drone. 30 kg (dual battery) / 40 kg (single battery). Cargo + winch modes. 28 km range empty, 16 km loaded. DJI O3, IP55, ADS-B, integrated parachute. FAA approved with Remote ID. NOT NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: Flyability Elios 3
drone_models.description: Confined space inspection drone. Collision-tolerant carbon cage. LiDAR SLAM navigation, 4K + thermal, GPS-denied. Recovers from upside-down flips. For tanks, boilers, mines, tunnels. 12-17 min flight. Swiss-made.

drone_models.name: WingtraOne GEN II / WingtraRAY
drone_models.description: Fixed-wing VTOL mapping drone. 59-min flight, 16 m/s cruise, PPK GNSS 1-3 cm accuracy. Swappable sensors (61MP RGB, 42MP full-frame, multispectral, LiDAR). Blue UAS, Green UAS. WingtraRAY covers 1300 acres/flight. Swiss-made.

drone_models.name: XAG P100 Pro / P150
drone_models.description: Chinese ag drone. P100: 50kg payload, 60L tank, 70 ac/hr. P150: 70L tank, 80kg max. Hot-swap spray/spread/map. NOT NDAA.

drone_models.name: Hylio AG-272
drone_models.description: US-made NDAA-compliant ag spray drone. 18 gal, 8-rotor, 50 ac/hr, TeeJet nozzles, GroundLink controller, AgroSol GCS. Made in Houston TX.

drone_models.name: senseFly eBee X
drone_models.description: Fixed-wing hand-launch mapping drone. 90-min flight, 500ha coverage, swappable cameras (RGB/multispectral/thermal). NDAA compliant. AgEagle.

drone_models.name: Quantum Systems Trinity Pro
drone_models.description: Long-endurance fixed-wing VTOL. 90-min flight, 75 km range, AI-ready edge computing. NATO/defense pedigree. German-made, NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: DJI Mavic 3 Enterprise
drone_models.description: Compact enterprise drone. Thermal (3T): 48MP+12MP zoom+640x512 thermal. Multispectral (3M): RGB+4-band. 45-min flight. NOT NDAA.

drone_models.name: Hoverfly LiveSky/Spectre
drone_models.description: Tethered UAS. Unlimited flight time via power tether. Persistent ISR, comms relay. Spectre is Blue UAS listed. Made in USA.

drone_models.name: Shield AI Nova 2
drone_models.description: Autonomous indoor ISR drone. Hivemind AI: no GPS, no pilot, no comms needed. Room-by-room autonomous clearing/mapping. NDAA. Made in USA. Mil/govt only.

drone_models.name: Neros Archer
drone_models.description: Blue UAS FPV drone. Up to 160 km/h. EW-resistant. First FPV on Blue UAS list (2025 29 Palms). Made in LA, CA.

drone_models.name: Ascent Aerosystems
drone_models.description: Coaxial drone design. Compact, robust, high-performance. Industrial, defense, public safety. NDAA compliant.

drone_models.name: Skycutter Shrike 10 Fiber
drone_models.description: Skycutter Shrike 10 Fiber. Fpv quadcopter with fiber-optic link, 1.0kg payload, NDAA compliant.

compliance.note: DDG Phase I winner — procurement pathway, not Blue UAS

specs.ew_immunity: Complete — zero RF emissions, invisible to SIGINT, immune to jamming
specs.ai: Gunslinger AI for pilot decision support

drone_models.name: Red Cat Holdings FANG F7
drone_models.description: Red Cat Holdings FANG F7. Quadcopter, Blue UAS approved, NDAA compliant.
drone_models.firmware: Brave F7 (STM32 F722, BMI270 Gyro, BMP390 Barometer)

specs.frame: CL2 3K carbon fiber, 8mm arm, 19mm motor mount
specs.motors: UMAC 2807 (28mm x 7mm stator, N552SH magnets, 12mm bearings, 3-8S)
specs.flight_controller: Brave F7 (STM32 F722, BMI270 Gyro, BMP390 Barometer)
